image_viewer

Image viewer window and image-opening helper.

   5"""Image viewer window and image-opening helper."""

  62FFT_COLORS = ["r", "g", "b", "y", "c", "m"]
  63DEFAULT_IMAGE_WINDOW_SIZE = (1000, 900)
  64DEFAULT_FFT_WINDOW_SIZE = (700, 700)
  65logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
  66
  67
  68class ImageViewerWindow(QtWidgets.QMainWindow):
  69    """Window for viewing and analyzing a single image with FFT boxes."""
  70
  71    def __init__(
  72        self,
  73        file_path: str,
  74        signal=None,
  75        window_suffix: Optional[str] = None,
  76        view_mode: str = "image",
  77        source_region: Optional[np.ndarray] = None,
  78        fft_region: Optional[np.ndarray] = None,
  79        fft_name: Optional[str] = None,
  80        parent_image_window: Optional["ImageViewerWindow"] = None,
  81    ):
  82        """Initialize an image viewer window for displaying TEM images and measurements.
  83        
  84        Args:
  85            file_path: Path to the source image file.
  86            signal: HyperSpy Signal object to display. If None, loaded from file_path.
  87            window_suffix: Optional suffix to append to window title (e.g., for multi-image files).
  88            view_mode: Display mode - "image" for direct view or "fft" for Fourier transform.
  89            source_region: Optional array specifying source region for FFT windows.
  90            fft_region: Optional array specifying FFT region for inverse FFT windows.
  91            fft_name: Optional name/label for FFT windows.
  92            parent_image_window: Reference to parent viewer for FFT/inverse FFT relationships.
  93        """
  94        super().__init__()
  95        self.setAcceptDrops(True)
  96        self.file_path = file_path
  97        self.view_mode = view_mode
  98        self.signal = None
  99        self.data = None
 100        self.ax_x = None
 101        self.ax_y = None
 102        self.p1 = None
 103        self.img_orig = None
 104        self.glw = None
 105        self.fft_boxes: List[pg.RectROI] = []
 106        self.fft_count = 0
 107        self.is_reciprocal_space = False
 108        self.line_tool: Optional[LineDrawingTool] = None
 109        self.fft_windows: List["ImageViewerWindow"] = []
 110        self.fft_to_fft_window: Dict[pg.RectROI, "ImageViewerWindow"] = {}
 111        self.fft_box_meta: Dict[pg.RectROI, Dict[str, object]] = {}
 112        self.selected_fft_box: Optional[pg.RectROI] = None
 113        self.inverse_fft_windows: List["ImageViewerWindow"] = []
 114        self.inverse_fft_to_window: Dict[pg.RectROI, "ImageViewerWindow"] = {}
 115        self.inverse_fft_box_meta: Dict[pg.RectROI, Dict[str, object]] = {}
 116        self.inverse_fft_boxes: List[pg.RectROI] = []
 117        self.inverse_fft_count = 0
 118        self.selected_inverse_fft_box: Optional[pg.RectROI] = None
 119        self.scale_bar: Optional[DynamicScaleBar] = None
 120        self.measurement_history_window: Optional[MeasurementHistoryWindow] = None
 121        self.metadata_window: Optional[MetadataWindow] = None
 122        self.measurement_count = 0
 123        self.profile_measurement_count = 0
 124        self.btn_measure: Optional[QtWidgets.QPushButton] = None
 125        self.measurement_items: List[Tuple[int, pg.PlotDataItem, pg.TextItem]] = []
 126        self.profile_measurement_items: Dict[int, Dict[str, Any]] = {}
 127        self.selected_measurement_index: Optional[int] = None
 128
 129        # Colormap state for the main image view
 130        self._available_colormaps: List[str] = [
 131            "gray",
 132            "viridis",
 133            "plasma",
 134            "magma",
 135            "inferno",
 136            "cividis",
 137        ]
 138        self._current_colormap_index: int = 0
 139        self.btn_colormap: Optional[QtWidgets.QAbstractButton] = None
 140
 141        # Vim-style command line (":" commands)
 142        self.command_edit: Optional[QtWidgets.QLineEdit] = None
 143
 144        self.display_min: Optional[float] = None
 145        self.display_max: Optional[float] = None
 146        self.display_gamma: float = 1.0
 147        self._tone_dialog: Optional[ToneCurveDialog] = None
 148
 149        self.fft_name = fft_name
 150        self.parent_image_window = parent_image_window
 151        self._magnitude_spectrum = None
 152        self._fft_complex = None
 153        self._inverse_fft_cache = None
 154        self._inverse_fft_image = None
 155        self._nyq_x = None
 156        self._nyq_y = None
 157        self._last_region_id = None
 158        self._source_region = source_region if source_region is not None else fft_region
 159        self._fft_region = self._source_region
 160        self.freq_axis_base_unit: str = "m"
 161        self._calibration_status: str = "metadata"
 162        self._manual_calibrated: bool = False
 163        self._line_draw_mode: str = "measurement"
 164        self._calibration_dialog_state: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None
 165        self._on_calibration_pixels_selected: Optional[Callable[[float], None]] = None
 166        self._base_window_title: str = ""
 167        self._render_settings: Dict[str, Any] = get_effective_render_settings()
 168        self._mipmap_levels: List[np.ndarray] = []
 169        self._current_mipmap_level: int = -1
 170        self._display_image_full_res: Optional[np.ndarray] = None
 171        self.measurements = MeasurementController(self, logger)
 172        self.fft_manager = FFTWindowManager(self, logger, FFT_COLORS)
 173        self.commands = ViewerCommandRouter(self, logger)
 174        self._command_mode = CommandModeController(
 175            command_edit_getter=lambda: self.command_edit,
 176            run_command=self.commands.run_vim_command,
 177            on_unknown_command=lambda cmd: QtWidgets.QMessageBox.information(
 178                self,
 179                "Command",
 180                f"Unknown command: {cmd}",
 181            ),
 182            focus_target_getter=lambda: self.glw if hasattr(self.glw, "setFocus") else None,
 183        )
 184        self.help_actions = HelpDialogActions(
 185            parent_widget=self,
 186            menu_config_provider=lambda: build_menu_config_for_role(role="viewer", callbacks_map={}),
 187            extra_shortcuts_provider=lambda: {
 188                "Enter command mode": ":",
 189                "Exit command mode": "Esc",
 190                "Delete selected ROI": "Delete",
 191            },
 192            additional_colormaps_provider=lambda: self._available_colormaps,
 193            logger_instance=logger,
 194        )
 195
 196        if self.view_mode in {"fft", "inverse_fft"}:
 197            self._setup_transform_view()
 198        elif signal is not None:
 199            self._setup_from_signal(signal, window_suffix)
 200        else:
 201            self._load_and_setup()
 202
 203        # Install a global key event filter so we can capture ':'
 204        # even when the plot widget has focus.
 205        app = QtWidgets.QApplication.instance()
 206        if app is not None:
 207            app.installEventFilter(self)
 208
 209    # Drag and drop -----------------------------------------------------
 210
 211    def dragEnterEvent(self, event: QtGui.QDragEnterEvent):  # type: ignore[override]
 212        """Accept drag events for image files.
 213
 214                        Args:
 215                            event: Qt event object carrying user interaction details.
 216                    
 217        """
 218        if event.mimeData().hasUrls():
 219            event.acceptProposedAction()
 220
 221    def dropEvent(self, event: QtGui.QDropEvent):  # type: ignore[override]
 222        """Handle dropped local files and open valid image paths.
 223
 224                        Args:
 225                            event: Qt event object carrying user interaction details.
 226                    
 227        """
 228        from pathlib import Path as _Path
 229
 230        for url in event.mimeData().urls():
 231            file_path = url.toLocalFile()
 232            if not file_path:
 233                continue
 234            try:
 235                if not _Path(file_path).is_file():
 236                    continue
 237            except Exception:
 238                continue
 239
 240            open_image_file(file_path)
 241
 242    # Loading and setup -------------------------------------------------
 243
 244    def _load_and_setup(self):
 245        """Load the image signal from disk and initialize viewer state."""
 246        try:
 247            logger.debug("Loading image via HyperSpy: %s", self.file_path)
 248            s = hs.load(self.file_path)
 249            if s.axes_manager.navigation_dimension != 0:
 250                logger.debug(
 251                    "Loaded signal has navigation_dimension=%s; using first navigation element",
 252                    s.axes_manager.navigation_dimension,
 253                )
 254                s = s.inav[0, 0]
 255            self._setup_from_signal(s)
 256            logger.debug("Image setup complete for: %s", self.file_path)
 257        except Exception as e:
 258            logger.exception("Failed to load file: %s", self.file_path)
 259            QtWidgets.QMessageBox.critical(self, "Error Loading File", str(e))
 260
 261    def _setup_from_signal(self, signal, window_suffix: Optional[str] = None):
 262        """Initialize viewer data, calibration, and display mode from a signal.
 263
 264            Args:
 265                signal: HyperSpy signal containing image data, axes, and metadata.
 266                window_suffix: Optional suffix appended to the window title for derived views.
 267        """
 268        self.signal = signal
 269        self.data = signal.data
 270        self.ax_x = signal.axes_manager[0]
 271        self.ax_y = signal.axes_manager[1]
 272
 273        calibrated = self._apply_calibration_from_original_metadata()
 274        if not calibrated:
 275            self._calibration_status = "uncalibrated"
 276            logger.debug("Startup metadata calibration failed; entering uncalibrated mode")
 277            QtWidgets.QMessageBox.warning(
 278                self,
 279                "Calibration",
 280                "This image could not be calibrated successfully from metadata; "
 281                "using default pixel scaling instead.",
 282            )
 283        else:
 284            self._calibration_status = "metadata"
 285            logger.debug("Startup metadata calibration applied successfully")
 286
 287        # Decide whether this view should be treated as reciprocal space.
 288        # Prefer explicit metadata / axis units when available so that
 289        # multiple images from the same file are classified consistently,
 290        # falling back to an image‑content heuristic only as a last resort.
 291        self.is_reciprocal_space = self._detect_reciprocal_space(signal)
 292        logger.debug(
 293            "Signal setup: shape=%s units=(%s,%s) reciprocal=%s",
 294            getattr(self.data, "shape", None),
 295            getattr(self.ax_x, "units", None),
 296            getattr(self.ax_y, "units", None),
 297            self.is_reciprocal_space,
 298        )
 299
 300        self._init_display_window()
 301
 302        file_name = Path(self.file_path).stem
 303        if window_suffix:
 304            title = f"Image Viewer - {file_name} {window_suffix}"
 305        else:
 306            title = f"Image Viewer - {file_name}"
 307        self._set_base_window_title(title)
 308
 309        self.setup_ui()
 310        self.resize(*DEFAULT_IMAGE_WINDOW_SIZE)
 311
 312
 313    def _setup_transform_view(self):
 314        """Initialize this window as an FFT or inverse-FFT transform view."""
 315        if self._source_region is None:
 316            QtWidgets.QMessageBox.critical(self, "FFT", "Could not create transform view: missing ROI data.")
 317            self.close()
 318            return
 319
 320        logger.debug(
 321            "Setting up transform view: mode=%s source_shape=%s source_dtype=%s",
 322            self.view_mode,
 323            getattr(self._source_region, "shape", None),
 324            getattr(self._source_region, "dtype", None),
 325        )
 326
 327        parent = self.parent_image_window
 328        if parent is None or parent.ax_x is None or parent.ax_y is None:
 329            QtWidgets.QMessageBox.critical(self, "FFT", "Could not create transform view: missing parent calibration.")
 330            self.close()
 331            return
 332
 333        is_fft_view = self.view_mode == "fft"
 334        self.is_reciprocal_space = is_fft_view
 335        self.ax_x = parent.ax_x
 336        self.ax_y = parent.ax_y
 337        self.freq_axis_base_unit = self.ax_x.units or "m"
 338
 339        parent_title = parent.windowTitle().replace("Image Viewer - ", "")
 340        default_name = "FFT" if is_fft_view else "iFFT"
 341        display_name = self.fft_name or default_name
 342        self._set_base_window_title(f"Image Viewer - {parent_title} - {display_name}")
 343
 344        self._refresh_transform_data()
 345        if self.view_mode == "fft":
 346            self.data = self._magnitude_spectrum # set the image date to the magnitude spectrum for the FFT view
 347        elif self.view_mode == "inverse_fft":
 348            self.data = self._inverse_fft_image # set the image data to the inverse FFT result for the iFFT view
 349        else:
 350            QtWidgets.QMessageBox.critical(self, "FFT", f"Unknown transform view mode: {self.view_mode}")
 351            self.close()
 352            return
 353        self._init_display_window()
 354        self.setup_ui()
 355        self.resize(*DEFAULT_FFT_WINDOW_SIZE)
 356
 357    def _get_original_metadata_dict(self) -> Optional[dict]:
 358        """Return original metadata dictionary for the current signal.
 359
 360            Returns:
 361                Computed result produced by this operation.
 362        """
 363        return self._get_original_metadata_dict_from_signal(self.signal)
 364
 365    def _get_original_metadata_dict_from_signal(self, signal) -> Optional[dict]:
 366        """Return original metadata dictionary from a provided signal object.
 367
 368            Args:
 369                signal: HyperSpy signal containing image data, axes, and metadata.
 370
 371            Returns:
 372                Computed result produced by this operation.
 373        """
 374        if signal is None:
 375            return None
 376
 377        original_meta = None
 378
 379        if hasattr(signal, "original_metadata"):
 380            original_meta = signal.original_metadata
 381        elif hasattr(signal.metadata, "original_metadata"):
 382            original_meta = signal.metadata.original_metadata
 383
 384        if original_meta is None:
 385            return None
 386
 387        if hasattr(original_meta, "as_dictionary"):
 388            return original_meta.as_dictionary()
 389
 390        try:
 391            return dict(original_meta)
 392        except Exception:
 393            return None
 394
 395    def _extract_ser_calibration(self, meta: dict) -> Optional[Tuple[float, float, Optional[float], Optional[float]]]:
 396        """Extract calibration deltas/offsets from SER reader metadata.
 397
 398            Args:
 399                meta: Metadata dictionary extracted from image headers or HyperSpy objects.
 400
 401            Returns:
 402                Tuple of (dx, dy, ox, oy) calibration values, or None when metadata is incomplete.
 403        """
 404        ser_params = None
 405        if "ser_header_parameters" in meta:
 406            ser_params = meta["ser_header_parameters"]
 407        else:
 408            for key, value in meta.items():
 409                if isinstance(key, str) and key.lower() == "ser_header_parameters":
 410                    ser_params = value
 411                    break
 412
 413        if not isinstance(ser_params, dict):
 414            logger.debug("Calibration metadata missing ser_header_parameters")
 415            return None
 416
 417        dx = ser_params.get("CalibrationDeltaX")
 418        dy = ser_params.get("CalibrationDeltaY")
 419        if not (isinstance(dx, (int, float)) and isinstance(dy, (int, float))):
 420            logger.debug("Calibration metadata has invalid deltas: dx=%r dy=%r", dx, dy)
 421            return None
 422        if dx <= 0 or dy <= 0:
 423            logger.debug("Calibration metadata deltas must be positive: dx=%r dy=%r", dx, dy)
 424            return None
 425
 426        ox = ser_params.get("CalibrationOffsetX")
 427        oy = ser_params.get("CalibrationOffsetY")
 428        out_ox = float(ox) if isinstance(ox, (int, float)) else None
 429        out_oy = float(oy) if isinstance(oy, (int, float)) else None
 430
 431        return float(dx), float(dy), out_ox, out_oy
 432
 433    def _apply_axis_calibration_values(
 434        self,
 435        dx: float,
 436        dy: float,
 437        units: str,
 438        ox: Optional[float] = None,
 439        oy: Optional[float] = None,
 440        source: str = "unknown",
 441    ) -> bool:
 442        """Apply axis scale/unit/offset calibration values to both plot axes.
 443
 444            Args:
 445                dx: Calibrated pixel spacing along the x-axis in physical units.
 446                dy: Calibrated pixel spacing along the y-axis in physical units.
 447                units: Physical unit label applied to both image axes.
 448                ox: Optional x-axis origin offset in calibrated units.
 449                oy: Optional y-axis origin offset in calibrated units.
 450                source: Human-readable source label used in diagnostics and logs.
 451
 452            Returns:
 453                True when axis scales/offsets are applied successfully; otherwise False.
 454        """
 455        if self.ax_x is None or self.ax_y is None:
 456            logger.debug("Skipping axis calibration apply (%s): axes unavailable", source)
 457            return False
 458
 459        try:
 460            self.ax_x.scale = float(dx)
 461            self.ax_y.scale = float(dy)
 462            self.ax_x.units = units
 463            self.ax_y.units = units
 464
 465            if ox is not None:
 466                self.ax_x.offset = float(ox)
 467            if oy is not None:
 468                self.ax_y.offset = float(oy)
 469        except Exception:
 470            logger.exception("Failed applying axis calibration (%s)", source)
 471            return False
 472
 473        logger.debug(
 474            "Applied axis calibration (%s): scale_x=%s scale_y=%s units=%s offset_x=%s offset_y=%s",
 475            source,
 476            dx,
 477            dy,
 478            units,
 479            ox,
 480            oy,
 481        )
 482        return True
 483
 484    def _apply_calibration_from_original_metadata(
 485        self,
 486        meta_override: Optional[dict] = None,
 487        source: str = "signal metadata",
 488    ) -> bool:
 489        """Apply SER calibration values extracted from original metadata.
 490
 491            Args:
 492                meta_override: Optional metadata dictionary used instead of signal metadata.
 493                source: Human-readable source label used in diagnostics and logs.
 494
 495            Returns:
 496                True when usable calibration metadata is found and applied.
 497        """
 498        meta = meta_override if meta_override is not None else self._get_original_metadata_dict()
 499        if not meta:
 500            logger.debug("No original metadata available for calibration (%s)", source)
 501            return False
 502
 503        extracted = self._extract_ser_calibration(meta)
 504        if extracted is None:
 505            logger.debug("Could not extract calibration values from metadata (%s)", source)
 506            return False
 507
 508        dx, dy, ox, oy = extracted
 509        return self._apply_axis_calibration_values(dx, dy, "m", ox=ox, oy=oy, source=source)
 510
 511    def _reload_calibration_from_file_metadata(self) -> bool:
 512        """Reload pixel calibration from the source image file metadata.
 513        
 514        Returns:
 515            True if calibration was successfully loaded, False otherwise.
 516        """
 517        if not self.file_path:
 518            logger.debug("Cannot reload metadata calibration: file_path is empty")
 519            return False
 520
 521        logger.debug("Reloading calibration metadata from file: %s", self.file_path)
 522        try:
 523            signal = hs.load(self.file_path)
 524            if signal.axes_manager.navigation_dimension != 0:
 525                signal = signal.inav[0, 0]
 526        except Exception:
 527            logger.exception("Failed to load file for metadata calibration reload: %s", self.file_path)
 528            return False
 529
 530        meta = self._get_original_metadata_dict_from_signal(signal)
 531        ok = self._apply_calibration_from_original_metadata(
 532            meta_override=meta,
 533            source="file metadata reload",
 534        )
 535        logger.debug("Metadata calibration reload result: success=%s", ok)
 536        return ok
 537
 538
 539    def _open_calibration_dialog(self, initial_state: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None) -> None:
 540        """Open the interactive calibration dialog for setting pixel size manually.
 541        
 542        Args:
 543            initial_state: Optional dict with initial calibration values.
 544        """
 545        if self.view_mode != "image" or self.ax_x is None or self.ax_y is None:
 546            QtWidgets.QMessageBox.information(
 547                self,
 548                "Parameters",
 549                "Calibration parameters are only editable for image views.",
 550            )
 551            return
 552
 553        logger.debug("Opening calibration dialog: initial_state_keys=%s", sorted((initial_state or {}).keys()))
 554
 555        state = dict(initial_state or {})
 556        current_scale_x = float(self.ax_x.scale)
 557        current_scale_y = float(self.ax_y.scale)
 558        default_ppu_x = calibration_logic.default_pixels_per_unit(current_scale_x)
 559        default_ppu_y = calibration_logic.default_pixels_per_unit(current_scale_y)
 560
 561        dialog = QtWidgets.QDialog(self)
 562        dialog.setWindowTitle("Parameters")
 563        layout = QtWidgets.QFormLayout(dialog)
 564
 565        unit_default = unit_utils.normalize_axis_unit(self.ax_x.units, default="nm")
 566
 567        edit_ppu_x = QtWidgets.QLineEdit(f"{float(state.get('ppu_x', default_ppu_x)):.12g}")
 568        edit_ppu_y = QtWidgets.QLineEdit(f"{float(state.get('ppu_y', default_ppu_y)):.12g}")
 569        edit_units = QtWidgets.QLineEdit(str(state.get("units", unit_default)))
 570        edit_ref_pixels = QtWidgets.QLineEdit(f"{float(state.get('reference_pixels', 0.0)):.12g}")
 571        initial_ref_distance = state.get("reference_distance")
 572        if initial_ref_distance is None:
 573            initial_ref_distance = f"{float(state.get('reference_units', 1.0)):.12g}"
 574        edit_ref_distance = QtWidgets.QLineEdit(str(initial_ref_distance))
 575        chk_lock_ratio = QtWidgets.QCheckBox("Lock X/Y pixel ratio")
 576        chk_lock_ratio.setChecked(bool(state.get("lock_xy", True)))
 577        lbl_ref_error = QtWidgets.QLabel("")
 578        lbl_ref_error.setStyleSheet("color: #d32f2f;")
 579        lbl_ref_error.setVisible(False)
 580
 581        def set_ref_error(message: Optional[str]) -> None:
 582            text = (message or "").strip()
 583            lbl_ref_error.setText(text)
 584            lbl_ref_error.setVisible(bool(text))
 585            if text:
 586                logger.debug("Calibration reference validation message: %s", text)
 587
 588        def sync_locked_ppu() -> None:
 589            if chk_lock_ratio.isChecked():
 590                edit_ppu_y.setText(edit_ppu_x.text().strip())
 591                edit_ppu_y.setEnabled(False)
 592            else:
 593                edit_ppu_y.setEnabled(True)
 594
 595        def update_ppu_from_reference() -> None:
 596            result = calibration_logic.parse_reference_ppu(
 597                reference_pixels_text=edit_ref_pixels.text(),
 598                reference_distance_text=edit_ref_distance.text(),
 599                target_units_text=edit_units.text(),
 600            )
 601
 602            if result.target_units != unit_utils.normalize_axis_unit(edit_units.text(), default="nm"):
 603                edit_units.blockSignals(True)
 604                edit_units.setText(result.target_units)
 605                edit_units.blockSignals(False)
 606
 607            if result.error:
 608                set_ref_error(result.error)
 609                return
 610
 611            if result.ppu is None:
 612                set_ref_error(None)
 613                return
 614
 615            ppu = result.ppu
 616            edit_ppu_x.setText(f"{ppu:.12g}")
 617            if chk_lock_ratio.isChecked():
 618                edit_ppu_y.setText(f"{ppu:.12g}")
 619            set_ref_error(None)
 620            logger.debug(
 621                "Calibration reference parsed: units=%s computed_ppu=%s",
 622                result.target_units,
 623                ppu,
 624            )
 625
 626        chk_lock_ratio.toggled.connect(sync_locked_ppu)
 627        edit_ppu_x.textChanged.connect(sync_locked_ppu)
 628        edit_ref_pixels.textChanged.connect(update_ppu_from_reference)
 629        edit_ref_distance.textChanged.connect(update_ppu_from_reference)
 630        edit_units.textChanged.connect(update_ppu_from_reference)
 631        sync_locked_ppu()
 632
 633        layout.addRow(chk_lock_ratio)
 634        layout.addRow("Pixels per unit X:", edit_ppu_x)
 635        layout.addRow("Pixels per unit Y:", edit_ppu_y)
 636        layout.addRow("Units:", edit_units)
 637        layout.addRow("Reference distance (pixels):", edit_ref_pixels)
 638        layout.addRow("Reference distance:", edit_ref_distance)
 639        layout.addRow("", lbl_ref_error)
 640
 641        draw_button = QtWidgets.QPushButton("Draw distance on canvas")
 642        layout.addRow("Reference picker:", draw_button)
 643
 644        draw_result_code = 2
 645        metadata_reloaded_in_dialog = False
 646
 647        def _collect_state() -> Dict[str, Any]:
 648            return {
 649                "ppu_x": edit_ppu_x.text().strip() or f"{default_ppu_x:.12g}",
 650                "ppu_y": edit_ppu_y.text().strip() or f"{default_ppu_y:.12g}",
 651                "units": edit_units.text().strip() or "nm",
 652                "reference_pixels": edit_ref_pixels.text().strip() or "0",
 653                "reference_distance": edit_ref_distance.text().strip() or "1",
 654                "lock_xy": chk_lock_ratio.isChecked(),
 655            }
 656
 657        def _request_draw() -> None:
 658            logger.debug("Calibration dialog draw requested")
 659            self._calibration_dialog_state = _collect_state()
 660            dialog.done(draw_result_code)
 661
 662        draw_button.clicked.connect(_request_draw)
 663
 664        def _reload_from_metadata() -> None:
 665            nonlocal metadata_reloaded_in_dialog
 666            logger.debug("Calibration dialog metadata reload requested")
 667            if not self._reload_calibration_from_file_metadata():
 668                set_ref_error("Could not reload calibration metadata from file.")
 669                QtWidgets.QMessageBox.warning(
 670                    dialog,
 671                    "Calibration",
 672                    "Could not reload calibration metadata from this file.",
 673                )
 674                return
 675
 676            self._manual_calibrated = False
 677            self._calibration_status = "metadata"
 678            self.is_reciprocal_space = self._detect_reciprocal_space(self.signal)
 679            self._refresh_view_after_calibration_change()
 680            metadata_reloaded_in_dialog = True
 681
 682            scale_x = float(self.ax_x.scale)
 683            scale_y = float(self.ax_y.scale)
 684            ppu_x = 1.0 / scale_x if scale_x > 0 else 1.0
 685            ppu_y = 1.0 / scale_y if scale_y > 0 else 1.0
 686            edit_ppu_x.setText(f"{ppu_x:.12g}")
 687            edit_ppu_y.setText(f"{ppu_y:.12g}")
 688            edit_units.setText(unit_utils.normalize_axis_unit(self.ax_x.units, default="nm"))
 689            set_ref_error(None)
 690            logger.debug(
 691                "Calibration dialog populated from reloaded metadata: ppu_x=%s ppu_y=%s units=%s",
 692                ppu_x,
 693                ppu_y,
 694                unit_utils.normalize_axis_unit(self.ax_x.units, default="nm"),
 695            )
 696
 697        buttons = QtWidgets.QDialogButtonBox(
 698            QtWidgets.QDialogButtonBox.Ok | QtWidgets.QDialogButtonBox.Cancel,
 699            parent=dialog,
 700        )
 701        btn_reload_meta = buttons.addButton(
 702            "Reload Metadata Calibration",
 703            QtWidgets.QDialogButtonBox.ActionRole,
 704        )
 705        btn_reload_meta.clicked.connect(_reload_from_metadata)
 706        buttons.accepted.connect(dialog.accept)
 707        buttons.rejected.connect(dialog.reject)
 708        layout.addRow(buttons)
 709
 710        result = dialog.exec_()
 711        if result == draw_result_code:
 712            logger.debug("Calibration dialog closed for distance drawing")
 713            self._start_calibration_distance_pick()
 714            return
 715
 716        if result != QtWidgets.QDialog.Accepted:
 717            logger.debug("Calibration dialog cancelled")
 718            self._calibration_dialog_state = None
 719            return
 720
 721        parsed_manual = calibration_logic.parse_manual_calibration(
 722            ppu_x_text=edit_ppu_x.text(),
 723            ppu_y_text=edit_ppu_y.text(),
 724            units_text=edit_units.text(),
 725            lock_xy=chk_lock_ratio.isChecked(),
 726        )
 727        if parsed_manual.error:
 728            QtWidgets.QMessageBox.warning(
 729                self,
 730                "Parameters",
 731                parsed_manual.error,
 732            )
 733            return
 734
 735        new_ppu_x = float(parsed_manual.ppu_x)
 736        new_ppu_y = float(parsed_manual.ppu_y)
 737        new_units = str(parsed_manual.units)
 738
 739        logger.debug(
 740            "Applying manual calibration from dialog: ppu_x=%s ppu_y=%s units=%s lock_xy=%s",
 741            new_ppu_x,
 742            new_ppu_y,
 743            new_units,
 744            chk_lock_ratio.isChecked(),
 745        )
 746
 747        proposed_scale_x = 1.0 / new_ppu_x
 748        proposed_scale_y = 1.0 / new_ppu_y
 749        current_units = unit_utils.normalize_axis_unit(self.ax_x.units, default="nm")
 750        current_scale_x = float(self.ax_x.scale)
 751        current_scale_y = float(self.ax_y.scale)
 752
 753        if calibration_logic.should_preserve_metadata_status(
 754            metadata_reloaded_in_dialog=metadata_reloaded_in_dialog,
 755            proposed_scale_x=proposed_scale_x,
 756            proposed_scale_y=proposed_scale_y,
 757            current_scale_x=current_scale_x,
 758            current_scale_y=current_scale_y,
 759            new_units=new_units,
 760            current_units=current_units,
 761        ):
 762            logger.debug(
 763                "Calibration dialog accepted after metadata reload with unchanged values; preserving metadata status"
 764            )
 765            self._manual_calibrated = False
 766            self._calibration_status = "metadata"
 767            self.is_reciprocal_space = self._detect_reciprocal_space(self.signal)
 768            self._refresh_view_after_calibration_change()
 769            self._calibration_dialog_state = None
 770            return
 771
 772        self.ax_x.scale = proposed_scale_x
 773        self.ax_y.scale = proposed_scale_y
 774        self.ax_x.units = new_units
 775        self.ax_y.units = new_units
 776        self._manual_calibrated = True
 777        self._calibration_status = "manual"
 778        self._calibration_dialog_state = None
 779        metadata_reciprocal = self._detect_reciprocal_space(self.signal)
 780        self.is_reciprocal_space = bool(metadata_reciprocal or unit_utils.is_reciprocal_unit(new_units))
 781        self._refresh_view_after_calibration_change()
 782        logger.debug("Manual calibration applied successfully")
 783
 784    def _prepare_for_measurement_input(self) -> None:
 785        """Clear transform-ROI selection state before entering any measurement flow."""
 786        had_fft = self.selected_fft_box is not None
 787        had_ifft = self.selected_inverse_fft_box is not None
 788
 789        self.selected_fft_box = None
 790        self.selected_inverse_fft_box = None
 791
 792        if had_fft or had_ifft:
 793            logger.debug(
 794                "Cleared ROI selection before measurement input: fft_selected=%s inverse_fft_selected=%s",
 795                had_fft,
 796                had_ifft,
 797            )
 798
 799    def _start_calibration_distance_pick(self) -> None:
 800        """Start interactive distance picking used by manual calibration."""
 801        if self.line_tool is None:
 802            logger.debug("Calibration distance pick requested but line tool is unavailable")
 803            QtWidgets.QMessageBox.warning(
 804                self,
 805                "Calibration",
 806                "Line drawing tool is not available.",
 807            )
 808            return
 809
 810        logger.debug("Starting calibration distance pick")
 811        self._prepare_for_measurement_input()
 812
 813        if self.btn_measure is not None:
 814            self.btn_measure.blockSignals(True)
 815            self.btn_measure.setChecked(False)
 816            self.btn_measure.blockSignals(False)
 817            self.btn_measure.setStyleSheet("")
 818
 819        self.line_tool.disable()
 820        self._on_measurement_drawing_state_changed(False)
 821
 822        state = dict(self._calibration_dialog_state or {})
 823        self._line_draw_mode = "calibration"
 824
 825        def _on_pixels_selected(pixel_distance: float) -> None:
 826            logger.debug("Calibration distance picked: %.6g px", pixel_distance)
 827            next_state = dict(state)
 828            next_state["reference_pixels"] = f"{pixel_distance:.12g}"
 829            self._calibration_dialog_state = None
 830            QtCore.QTimer.singleShot(0, lambda: self._open_calibration_dialog(next_state))
 831
 832        self._on_calibration_pixels_selected = _on_pixels_selected
 833        self.line_tool.enable()
 834        self._on_measurement_drawing_state_changed(False)
 835
 836    def _set_base_window_title(self, title: str) -> None:
 837        """Set and store the base window title used by stateful title updates.
 838
 839                        Args:
 840                            title: Title text displayed in the associated UI element.
 841                    
 842        """
 843        self._base_window_title = title
 844        self._on_measurement_drawing_state_changed(False)
 845
 846    def _on_measurement_drawing_state_changed(self, is_drawing: bool) -> None:
 847        """Refresh window-title hints when measurement drawing mode changes.
 848
 849                        Args:
 850                            is_drawing: Boolean flag indicating whether drawing.
 851                    
 852        """
 853        title = self._base_window_title or self.windowTitle()
 854        for prefix in ("Measurement mode - ", "<esc> to exit measurement mode - "):
 855            if title.startswith(prefix):
 856                title = title[len(prefix):]
 857
 858        measurement_ready = bool(self.line_tool is not None and getattr(self.line_tool, "is_enabled", False))
 859        if measurement_ready:
 860            title = f"<esc> to exit measurement mode - {title}"
 861
 862        if self.windowTitle() != title:
 863            self.setWindowTitle(title)
 864            logger.debug(
 865                "Window title updated for measurement mode: drawing=%s ready=%s title=%s",
 866                is_drawing,
 867                measurement_ready,
 868                title,
 869            )
 870
 871    def _sync_scale_bar_units_from_axes(self) -> None:
 872        """Sync scale-bar unit text/mode from current axis units."""
 873        if self.scale_bar is None or self.ax_x is None:
 874            return
 875
 876        display_unit, reciprocal_mode = unit_utils.scale_bar_unit_and_mode(
 877            self.ax_x.units,
 878            reciprocal_hint=self.is_reciprocal_space,
 879        )
 880        self.scale_bar.units = display_unit
 881        self.scale_bar.reciprocal = reciprocal_mode
 882        logger.debug(
 883            "Scale bar sync from axes: axis_units=%s display_unit=%s reciprocal=%s",
 884            self.ax_x.units,
 885            display_unit,
 886            reciprocal_mode,
 887        )
 888
 889    def _refresh_view_after_calibration_change(self) -> None:
 890        """Apply updated calibration to image rect, ranges, and scale bar."""
 891        x_offset, y_offset, w, h = self.image_bounds
 892        logger.debug(
 893            "Refreshing view after calibration change: x_offset=%s y_offset=%s w=%s h=%s",
 894            x_offset,
 895            y_offset,
 896            w,
 897            h,
 898        )
 899
 900        if self.img_orig is not None:
 901            self.img_orig.setRect(QtCore.QRectF(x_offset, y_offset, w, h))
 902
 903        if self.p1 is not None:
 904            self.p1.setXRange(x_offset, x_offset + w, padding=0)
 905            self.p1.setYRange(y_offset, y_offset + h, padding=0)
 906
 907        if self.scale_bar is not None:
 908            self._sync_scale_bar_units_from_axes()
 909            if hasattr(self.scale_bar, "_update_geometry"):
 910                self.scale_bar._update_geometry()
 911
 912        self._refresh_scale_bar_calibration_tag()
 913
 914    def _refresh_scale_bar_calibration_tag(self) -> None:
 915        """Update the scale-bar tag indicating current calibration status."""
 916        if self.scale_bar is None or not hasattr(self.scale_bar, "set_status_tag"):
 917            return
 918
 919        if self._calibration_status == "uncalibrated":
 920            self.scale_bar.set_status_tag("UNCALIBRATED")
 921        elif self._calibration_status == "manual":
 922            self.scale_bar.set_status_tag("manually calibrated")
 923        else:
 924            self.scale_bar.set_status_tag(None)
 925        logger.debug("Scale bar calibration tag refreshed: status=%s", self._calibration_status)
 926
 927    def _detect_reciprocal_space(self, signal) -> bool:
 928        """Determine if the signal should be treated as reciprocal space.
 929
 930            Args:
 931                signal: HyperSpy signal containing image data, axes, and metadata.
 932
 933            Returns:
 934                Computed result produced by this operation.
 935        """
 936
 937        # 1) Prefer explicit HyperSpy metadata when available
 938        try:
 939            meta = getattr(signal, "metadata", None)
 940            sig_meta = getattr(meta, "Signal", None)
 941            sig_type = getattr(sig_meta, "signal_type", None)
 942            if isinstance(sig_type, str):
 943                st = sig_type.strip().lower()
 944                if st in {"diffraction", "electron_diffraction", "fft"}:
 945                    return True
 946                if st in {"image", "tem", "stem"}:
 947                    return False
 948        except Exception:
 949            pass
 950
 951        # 2) Inspect axis unit strings for common reciprocal-space patterns
 952        units_parts: list[str] = []
 953        try:
 954            ax0 = signal.axes_manager[0]
 955            ax1 = signal.axes_manager[1]
 956            units_parts.append(str(getattr(ax0, "units", "") or ""))
 957            units_parts.append(str(getattr(ax1, "units", "") or ""))
 958        except Exception:
 959            pass
 960
 961        if any(unit_utils.is_reciprocal_unit(part) for part in units_parts):
 962            return True
 963
 964        # 3) Default: treat as real-space image. We no longer rely on
 965        # intensity-based heuristics for diffraction detection because
 966        # they can classify visually similar images from the same file
 967        # differently, leading to inconsistent scale-bar behaviour.
 968        return False
 969
 970    @property
 971    def image_bounds(self) -> Tuple[float, float, float, float]:
 972        """Get the pixel bounds of the displayed image.
 973        
 974        Returns:
 975            (x_min, x_max, y_min, y_max) in image pixel coordinates.
 976        """
 977        x_offset = self.ax_x.offset if self.ax_x else 0
 978        y_offset = self.ax_y.offset if self.ax_y else 0
 979        w = self.ax_x.size * self.ax_x.scale if self.ax_x else 1
 980        h = self.ax_y.size * self.ax_y.scale if self.ax_y else 1
 981        return x_offset, y_offset, w, h
 982
 983    def _init_display_window(self):
 984        """Initialize display min/max/gamma from current source data."""
 985        source_data = self.data
 986        if self.view_mode == "fft":
 987            source_data = self._magnitude_spectrum
 988        elif self.view_mode == "inverse_fft":
 989            source_data = self._inverse_fft_image
 990
 991        if source_data is None:
 992            self.display_min = 0.0
 993            self.display_max = 1.0
 994            self.display_gamma = 1.0
 995            return
 996
 997        arr = np.asarray(source_data, dtype=float)
 998        finite = arr[np.isfinite(arr)]
 999        if finite.size == 0:
1000            self.display_min = 0.0
1001            self.display_max = 1.0
1002        else:
1003            self.display_min = float(finite.min())
1004            self.display_max = float(finite.max())
1005        self.display_gamma = 1.0
1006        logger.debug(
1007            "Initialized display window: min=%s max=%s gamma=%s",
1008            self.display_min,
1009            self.display_max,
1010            self.display_gamma,
1011        )
1012
1013    def setup_ui(self):
1014        """Set up the main UI layout with plot, controls, and toolbars."""
1015        central = QtWidgets.QWidget()
1016        self.setCentralWidget(central)
1017        main_layout = QtWidgets.QVBoxLayout(central)
1018        main_layout.setContentsMargins(0, 0, 0, 0)
1019        self._setup_menu_bar()
1020
1021        self.glw = pg.GraphicsLayoutWidget()
1022        logger.debug(
1023            "setup_ui: mode=%s useOpenGL=%s QT_QPA_PLATFORM=%r QT_OPENGL=%r",
1024            self.view_mode,
1025            pg.getConfigOption("useOpenGL"),
1026            os.environ.get("QT_QPA_PLATFORM"),
1027            os.environ.get("QT_OPENGL"),
1028        )
1029        self.glw.ci.setContentsMargins(0, 0, 0, 0)
1030        if hasattr(self.glw.ci, "layout"):
1031            self.glw.ci.layout.setContentsMargins(0, 0, 0, 0)
1032            self.glw.ci.layout.setSpacing(0)
1033        main_layout.addWidget(self.glw)
1034
1035        # Hidden command line at the bottom, shown when ':' is pressed
1036        self.command_edit = QtWidgets.QLineEdit()
1037        self.command_edit.setPlaceholderText(
1038            "Vim command (:F, :d, :e <file>, :E, :a)"
1039        )
1040        self.command_edit.returnPressed.connect(self._execute_command_from_line)
1041        self.command_edit.hide()
1042        main_layout.addWidget(self.command_edit)
1043
1044        # Shortcut for ':' so command mode is easy to enter while this
1045        # image window is active.
1046        colon_shortcut = QtGui.QShortcut(QtGui.QKeySequence(":"), self)
1047        colon_shortcut.activated.connect(self._enter_command_mode)
1048
1049        self.btn_measure = QtWidgets.QPushButton("Measure Distance")
1050        self.btn_measure.setCheckable(True)
1051        self.btn_measure.clicked.connect(self.measurements.toggle_line_measurement)
1052        self.btn_measure.hide()
1053
1054        self.p1 = self.glw.addPlot()
1055        self.p1.hideAxis("bottom")
1056        self.p1.hideAxis("left")
1057        self.p1.showAxis("top", False)
1058        self.p1.showAxis("right", False)
1059        self.p1.hideButtons()
1060        self.p1.setMenuEnabled(False)
1061
1062        self.p1.vb.setAspectLocked(True, ratio=1.0)
1063        if hasattr(self.p1.vb, "setBorder"):
1064            self.p1.vb.setBorder(None)
1065
1066        self.img_orig = pg.ImageItem(axisOrder="row-major")
1067        self.p1.addItem(self.img_orig)
1068        self._apply_render_preferences_to_view()
1069        self.p1.invertY(True)
1070        if self.view_mode == "fft":
1071            cmap = pg.colormap.get("magma")
1072            self.img_orig.setLookupTable(cmap.getLookupTable())
1073            self._update_image_display()
1074            if self._nyq_x is not None and self._nyq_y is not None:
1075                self.img_orig.setRect(
1076                    QtCore.QRectF(-self._nyq_x, -self._nyq_y, 2 * self._nyq_x, 2 * self._nyq_y)
1077                )
1078            if hasattr(self.p1.vb, "setPadding"):
1079                self.p1.vb.setPadding(0.0)
1080            fft_unit, fft_reciprocal = unit_utils.scale_bar_unit_and_mode(
1081                self.freq_axis_base_unit,
1082                reciprocal_hint=True,
1083            )
1084            self.scale_bar = DynamicScaleBar(self.p1.vb, units=fft_unit)
1085            self.scale_bar.reciprocal = fft_reciprocal
1086        elif self.view_mode == "inverse_fft":
1087            self.img_orig.setLookupTable(None)
1088            self._update_image_display()
1089            x_offset, y_offset, w, h = self.image_bounds
1090            self.img_orig.setRect(QtCore.QRectF(x_offset, y_offset, w, h))
1091
1092            if hasattr(self.p1.vb, "setPadding"):
1093                self.p1.vb.setPadding(0.0)
1094            self.p1.setXRange(x_offset, x_offset + w, padding=0)
1095            self.p1.setYRange(y_offset, y_offset + h, padding=0)
1096
1097            axis_units = self.ax_x.units if self.ax_x is not None else "nm"
1098            display_unit, reciprocal_mode = unit_utils.scale_bar_unit_and_mode(
1099                axis_units,
1100                reciprocal_hint=False,
1101            )
1102            self.scale_bar = DynamicScaleBar(self.p1.vb, units=display_unit)
1103            self.scale_bar.reciprocal = reciprocal_mode
1104        else:
1105            self._apply_colormap()
1106            self._update_image_display()
1107
1108            x_offset, y_offset, w, h = self.image_bounds
1109            self.img_orig.setRect(QtCore.QRectF(x_offset, y_offset, w, h))
1110
1111            if hasattr(self.p1.vb, "setPadding"):
1112                self.p1.vb.setPadding(0.0)
1113            self.p1.setXRange(x_offset, x_offset + w, padding=0)
1114            self.p1.setYRange(y_offset, y_offset + h, padding=0)
1115
1116            axis_units = self.ax_x.units if self.ax_x is not None else "nm"
1117            display_unit, reciprocal_mode = unit_utils.scale_bar_unit_and_mode(
1118                axis_units,
1119                reciprocal_hint=self.is_reciprocal_space,
1120            )
1121            self.scale_bar = DynamicScaleBar(self.p1.vb, units=display_unit)
1122            self.scale_bar.reciprocal = reciprocal_mode
1123            if not reciprocal_mode:
1124                try:
1125                    overlay_label = self._build_export_overlay_label()
1126                    if overlay_label and hasattr(self.scale_bar, "set_extra_label"):
1127                        self.scale_bar.set_extra_label(overlay_label)
1128                except Exception:
1129                    pass
1130
1131            self._refresh_scale_bar_calibration_tag()
1132
1133        self.line_tool = LineDrawingTool(
1134            self.p1,
1135            self.measurements.on_line_drawn,
1136            self._on_measurement_drawing_state_changed,
1137        )
1138
1139        if hasattr(self.p1, "vb") and hasattr(self.p1.vb, "sigRangeChanged"):
1140            self.p1.vb.sigRangeChanged.connect(self._on_view_range_changed)
1141
1142        self.setup_keyboard_shortcuts()
1143
1144    def _render_quality_mode(self) -> str:
1145        """Return configured image-resampling quality mode.
1146
1147            Returns:
1148                Normalized render quality mode key used by the viewer pipeline.
1149        """
1150        return str(self._render_settings.get("image_resampling_quality", RESAMPLING_HIGH)).strip().lower()
1151
1152    def _apply_render_preferences_to_view(self) -> None:
1153        """Apply rendering preference flags to the image view backend."""
1154        if self.img_orig is None or self.glw is None:
1155            return
1156
1157        quality = self._render_quality_mode()
1158        auto_downsample = quality in {RESAMPLING_BALANCED, RESAMPLING_HIGH}
1159        smooth = quality in {RESAMPLING_BALANCED, RESAMPLING_HIGH}
1160
1161        if hasattr(self.img_orig, "setAutoDownsample"):
1162            self.img_orig.setAutoDownsample(auto_downsample)
1163
1164        if hasattr(self.glw, "setRenderHint"):
1165            self.glw.setRenderHint(QtGui.QPainter.SmoothPixmapTransform, smooth)
1166
1167        logger.debug(
1168            "Applied render preferences: mode=%s quality=%s auto_downsample=%s smooth_transform=%s useOpenGL=%s",
1169            self.view_mode,
1170            quality,
1171            auto_downsample,
1172            smooth,
1173            pg.getConfigOption("useOpenGL"),
1174        )
1175
1176    @staticmethod
1177    def _downsample_by_2_mean(image: np.ndarray) -> Optional[np.ndarray]:
1178        """Downsample a 2D image by 2x2 mean pooling.
1179
1180            Args:
1181                image: 2D image array used for display, FFT, or tone processing.
1182
1183            Returns:
1184                Half-resolution image created by 2x2 mean pooling, or None for unsupported inputs.
1185        """
1186        if image.ndim != 2:
1187            return None
1188
1189        src = np.asarray(image, dtype=np.float32)
1190        h, w = src.shape
1191        h2 = (h // 2) * 2
1192        w2 = (w // 2) * 2
1193        if h2 < 2 or w2 < 2:
1194            return None
1195
1196        view = src[:h2, :w2]
1197        return view.reshape(h2 // 2, 2, w2 // 2, 2).mean(axis=(1, 3), dtype=np.float32)
1198
1199    def _build_mipmap_levels(self, image: np.ndarray) -> None:
1200        """Build a pyramid of downsampled levels for high-quality zooming.
1201
1202                        Args:
1203                            image: Input image array used by the computation.
1204                    
1205        """
1206        self._mipmap_levels = []
1207        base = np.asarray(image, dtype=np.float32)
1208        self._mipmap_levels.append(base)
1209
1210        while len(self._mipmap_levels) < 9:
1211            nxt = self._downsample_by_2_mean(self._mipmap_levels[-1])
1212            if nxt is None:
1213                break
1214            self._mipmap_levels.append(nxt)
1215
1216        self._current_mipmap_level = -1
1217
1218    def _compute_target_mipmap_level(self) -> int:
1219        """Select mipmap level that best matches current visible resolution.
1220
1221            Returns:
1222                Best mipmap pyramid level for the current zoom and viewport.
1223        """
1224        if not self._mipmap_levels or self.p1 is None or self.img_orig is None:
1225            return 0
1226
1227        try:
1228            rect = self.img_orig.rect()
1229            rect_w = float(rect.width())
1230            rect_h = float(rect.height())
1231            if rect_w <= 0 or rect_h <= 0:
1232                return 0
1233
1234            vr = self.p1.vb.viewRange()
1235            x0, x1 = float(vr[0][0]), float(vr[0][1])
1236            y0, y1 = float(vr[1][0]), float(vr[1][1])
1237
1238            visible_cols = abs((x1 - x0) / rect_w) * float(self._mipmap_levels[0].shape[1])
1239            visible_rows = abs((y1 - y0) / rect_h) * float(self._mipmap_levels[0].shape[0])
1240
1241            view_px_w = max(float(self.p1.vb.width()), 1.0)
1242            view_px_h = max(float(self.p1.vb.height()), 1.0)
1243
1244            src_per_screen = max(visible_cols / view_px_w, visible_rows / view_px_h, 1.0)
1245            level = int(np.floor(np.log2(src_per_screen)))
1246        except Exception:
1247            return 0
1248
1249        return max(0, min(level, len(self._mipmap_levels) - 1))
1250
1251    def _set_display_image(self, image: np.ndarray) -> None:
1252        """Push image data into the display item with current quality mode.
1253
1254                        Args:
1255                            image: Input image array used by the computation.
1256                    
1257        """
1258        if self.img_orig is None:
1259            return
1260
1261        self._display_image_full_res = np.asarray(image, dtype=np.float32)
1262        quality = self._render_quality_mode()
1263
1264        if quality == RESAMPLING_HIGH:
1265            self._build_mipmap_levels(self._display_image_full_res)
1266            self._on_view_range_changed(force=True)
1267            return
1268
1269        self._mipmap_levels = []
1270        self._current_mipmap_level = -1
1271        self.img_orig.setImage(self._display_image_full_res, autoLevels=False, levels=(0.0, 1.0))
1272
1273    def _on_view_range_changed(self, *_args, force: bool = False) -> None:
1274        """Update displayed mipmap image after pan/zoom range changes.
1275
1276            Args:
1277                *_args: Additional callback arguments from Qt signal emissions.
1278                force: When True, refreshes display state even if cached values match.
1279        """
1280        if self.img_orig is None:
1281            return
1282        if self._render_quality_mode() != RESAMPLING_HIGH:
1283            return
1284        if not self._mipmap_levels:
1285            return
1286
1287        level = self._compute_target_mipmap_level()
1288        if not force and level == self._current_mipmap_level:
1289            return
1290
1291        self._current_mipmap_level = level
1292        self.img_orig.setImage(self._mipmap_levels[level], autoLevels=False, levels=(0.0, 1.0))
1293
1294    def _update_image_display(self):
1295        """Render source data into the image item using tone and colormap settings."""
1296        if self.data is None or self.img_orig is None:
1297            if self.view_mode not in {"fft", "inverse_fft"}:
1298                return
1299
1300        if self.display_min is None or self.display_max is None:
1301            self._init_display_window()
1302
1303        if self.view_mode == "fft":
1304            if self._magnitude_spectrum is None:
1305                return
1306
1307            display_data = self._magnitude_spectrum
1308
1309            adjusted = utils.apply_intensity_transform(
1310                display_data,
1311                self.display_min,
1312                self.display_max,
1313                self.display_gamma,
1314            )
1315            if adjusted is None:
1316                return
1317
1318            self._set_display_image(adjusted)
1319            if self._nyq_x is not None and self._nyq_y is not None:
1320                self.img_orig.setRect(
1321                    QtCore.QRectF(-self._nyq_x, -self._nyq_y, 2 * self._nyq_x, 2 * self._nyq_y)
1322                )
1323            return
1324
1325        if self.view_mode == "inverse_fft":
1326            if self._inverse_fft_image is None:
1327                return
1328
1329            adjusted = utils.apply_intensity_transform(
1330                self._inverse_fft_image,
1331                self.display_min,
1332                self.display_max,
1333                self.display_gamma,
1334            )
1335            if adjusted is None:
1336                return
1337
1338            self._set_display_image(adjusted)
1339            return
1340
1341        display_data = self.data
1342
1343        adjusted = utils.apply_intensity_transform(
1344            display_data,
1345            self.display_min,
1346            self.display_max,
1347            self.display_gamma,
1348        )
1349        if adjusted is None:
1350            return
1351
1352        self._set_display_image(adjusted)
1353
1354    def _apply_colormap(self) -> None:
1355        """Apply the currently selected colormap to the main image."""
1356
1357        if self.img_orig is None:
1358            return
1359
1360        if not self._available_colormaps:
1361            return
1362
1363        name = self._available_colormaps[self._current_colormap_index % len(self._available_colormaps)]
1364
1365        # "gray" means the default grayscale appearance (no custom LUT)
1366        if name == "gray":
1367            try:
1368                self.img_orig.setLookupTable(None)
1369            except Exception:
1370                pass
1371            return
1372
1373        try:
1374            cmap = pg.colormap.get(name)
1375            self.img_orig.setLookupTable(cmap.getLookupTable())
1376        except Exception:
1377            # Fall back to default grayscale if something goes wrong
1378            try:
1379                self.img_orig.setLookupTable(None)
1380            except Exception:
1381                pass
1382
1383    def setup_keyboard_shortcuts(self):
1384        """Configure keyboard shortcuts for common image operations.
1385        
1386        Sets up Delete key for removing FFT regions and other navigation shortcuts.
1387        """
1388        delete_shortcut = QtGui.QShortcut(QtGui.QKeySequence.Delete, self)
1389        delete_shortcut.activated.connect(self.fft_manager.delete_selected_roi)
1390
1391        backspace_shortcut = QtGui.QShortcut(
1392            QtGui.QKeySequence(QtCore.Qt.Key_Backspace), self
1393        )
1394        backspace_shortcut.activated.connect(self.fft_manager.delete_selected_roi)
1395
1396        escape_shortcut = QtGui.QShortcut(QtGui.QKeySequence(QtCore.Qt.Key_Escape), self)
1397        escape_shortcut.activated.connect(self.measurements.exit_measure_mode)
1398
1399    def _set_colormap_by_name(self, name: str) -> None:
1400        """Set the active colormap by name and update the button label.
1401
1402                        Args:
1403                            name: Name identifier used to locate or label an entity.
1404                    
1405        """
1406
1407        if not self._available_colormaps:
1408            return
1409
1410        try:
1411            index = self._available_colormaps.index(name)
1412        except ValueError:
1413            return
1414
1415        self._current_colormap_index = index
1416
1417        if self.btn_colormap is not None:
1418            self.btn_colormap.setText(f"Colormap: {name}")
1419
1420        self._apply_colormap()
1421
1422    def _cycle_colormap_forward(self) -> None:
1423        """Cycle to the next colormap in the list.
1424        
1425        Triggered by the + key. Keyboard shortcut for quick colormap navigation.
1426        """
1427        if not self._available_colormaps:
1428            return
1429        
1430        self._current_colormap_index = (self._current_colormap_index + 1) % len(self._available_colormaps)
1431        current_cmap = self._available_colormaps[self._current_colormap_index]
1432        
1433        if self.btn_colormap is not None:
1434            self.btn_colormap.setText(f"Colormap: {current_cmap}")
1435        
1436        self._apply_colormap()
1437        logger.debug(f"Colormap cycled forward to: {current_cmap}")
1438
1439    def _cycle_colormap_backward(self) -> None:
1440        """Cycle to the previous colormap in the list.
1441        
1442        Triggered by the - key. Keyboard shortcut for quick colormap navigation.
1443        """
1444        if not self._available_colormaps:
1445            return
1446        
1447        self._current_colormap_index = (self._current_colormap_index - 1) % len(self._available_colormaps)
1448        current_cmap = self._available_colormaps[self._current_colormap_index]
1449        
1450        if self.btn_colormap is not None:
1451            self.btn_colormap.setText(f"Colormap: {current_cmap}")
1452        
1453        self._apply_colormap()
1454        logger.debug(f"Colormap cycled backward to: {current_cmap}")
1455
1456    def _refresh_transform_data(self):
1457        """Refresh cached FFT/inverse-FFT data from the current source region."""
1458        logger.debug(
1459            "Refreshing transform data: mode=%s source_shape=%s last_region_id=%s",
1460            self.view_mode,
1461            getattr(self._source_region, "shape", None),
1462            self._last_region_id,
1463        )
1464        if self.view_mode == "fft":
1465            self._compute_fft()
1466        elif self.view_mode == "inverse_fft":
1467            self._compute_inverse_fft_from_region()
1468
1469    def _compute_fft(self):
1470        """Compute and cache FFT magnitude/complex arrays for the source ROI."""
1471        if self._source_region is None or self.ax_x is None or self.ax_y is None:
1472            logger.debug("Skipping FFT compute: missing source region or axes")
1473            return
1474
1475        current_region_id = id(self._source_region)
1476        if self._last_region_id == current_region_id and self._magnitude_spectrum is not None:
1477            logger.debug("Skipping FFT compute: region id unchanged (%s)", current_region_id)
1478            return
1479
1480        self._last_region_id = current_region_id
1481
1482        self._magnitude_spectrum, self._nyq_x, self._nyq_y = utils.compute_fft(
1483            self._source_region,
1484            self.ax_x.scale,
1485            self.ax_y.scale,
1486        )
1487        logger.debug(
1488            "Computed FFT: shape=%s nyq_x=%s nyq_y=%s min=%s max=%s",
1489            getattr(self._magnitude_spectrum, "shape", None),
1490            self._nyq_x,
1491            self._nyq_y,
1492            float(np.nanmin(self._magnitude_spectrum)) if self._magnitude_spectrum is not None else None,
1493            float(np.nanmax(self._magnitude_spectrum)) if self._magnitude_spectrum is not None else None,
1494        )
1495
1496        window = np.hanning(self._source_region.shape[0])[:, None] * np.hanning(
1497            self._source_region.shape[1]
1498        )[None, :]
1499        windowed = self._source_region * window
1500        self._fft_complex = np.fft.fftshift(np.fft.fft2(windowed))
1501        self._inverse_fft_cache = None
1502
1503    def _compute_inverse_fft_from_region(self):
1504        """Compute inverse FFT image from the current source-region data."""
1505        if self._source_region is None or self.ax_x is None or self.ax_y is None:
1506            logger.debug("Skipping inverse FFT compute: missing source region or axes")
1507            return
1508
1509        current_region_id = id(self._source_region)
1510        if self._last_region_id == current_region_id and self._inverse_fft_image is not None:
1511            logger.debug("Skipping inverse FFT compute: region id unchanged (%s)", current_region_id)
1512            return
1513
1514        self._last_region_id = current_region_id
1515
1516        source_region = np.asarray(self._source_region, dtype=np.float32)
1517        if source_region.ndim != 2:
1518            logger.debug("Skipping inverse FFT compute: source region is not 2D (ndim=%s)", source_region.ndim)
1519            return
1520
1521        self._inverse_fft_image = np.abs(np.fft.fftshift(np.fft.ifft2(np.fft.ifftshift(source_region))))
1522        logger.debug(
1523            "Computed inverse FFT: input_shape=%s output_shape=%s output_min=%s output_max=%s",
1524            source_region.shape,
1525            getattr(self._inverse_fft_image, "shape", None),
1526            float(np.nanmin(self._inverse_fft_image)) if self._inverse_fft_image is not None else None,
1527            float(np.nanmax(self._inverse_fft_image)) if self._inverse_fft_image is not None else None,
1528        )
1529
1530    # Vim-style command handling -------------------------------------
1531
1532    def eventFilter(self, obj, event):  # type: ignore[override]
1533        """Capture ':' globally when this window is active.
1534
1535            Args:
1536                obj: QObject currently being filtered by the event filter.
1537                event: Qt drag/drop or input event provided by the GUI framework.
1538        """
1539        if self._command_mode.handle_key_event(self.isActiveWindow(), event):
1540            return True
1541
1542        return super().eventFilter(obj, event)
1543
1544    def _enter_command_mode(self) -> None:
1545        """Move focus into command-line mode for vim-style commands."""
1546        self._command_mode.enter_mode()
1547
1548    def _exit_command_mode(self) -> None:
1549        """Exit command mode and restore focus to the graphics widget."""
1550        self._command_mode.exit_mode()
1551
1552    def _execute_command_from_line(self) -> None:
1553        """Parse and execute the current command-line text input."""
1554        self._command_mode.execute_from_line()
1555
1556    def _open_adjust_dialog(self):
1557        """Open or focus the tone-curve adjustment dialog for current view data."""
1558        if self.view_mode == "fft" and self._magnitude_spectrum is None:
1559            return
1560
1561        if self.view_mode == "inverse_fft" and self._inverse_fft_image is None:
1562            return
1563
1564        if self.view_mode == "image" and self.data is None:
1565            return
1566
1567        if self._tone_dialog is not None and self._tone_dialog.isVisible():
1568            self._tone_dialog.raise_()
1569            self._tone_dialog.activateWindow()
1570            return
1571
1572        initial_min = self.display_min
1573        initial_max = self.display_max
1574        initial_gamma = self.display_gamma
1575
1576        def on_params_changed(min_val: float, max_val: float, gamma: float):
1577            self.display_min = float(min_val)
1578            self.display_max = float(max_val)
1579            self.display_gamma = float(gamma)
1580            self._update_image_display()
1581
1582        if self.view_mode == "fft":
1583            source_data = self._magnitude_spectrum
1584        elif self.view_mode == "inverse_fft":
1585            source_data = self._inverse_fft_image
1586        else:
1587            source_data = self.data
1588
1589        dialog = ToneCurveDialog(
1590            source_data,
1591            initial_min=initial_min,
1592            initial_max=initial_max,
1593            initial_gamma=initial_gamma,
1594            parent=self,
1595            on_params_changed=on_params_changed,
1596        )
1597        self._tone_dialog = dialog
1598
1599        orig_min, orig_max, orig_gamma = (
1600            self.display_min,
1601            self.display_max,
1602            self.display_gamma,
1603        )
1604
1605        def handle_rejected():
1606            self.display_min, self.display_max, self.display_gamma = (
1607                orig_min,
1608                orig_max,
1609                orig_gamma,
1610            )
1611            self._update_image_display()
1612
1613        def handle_finished(_result):
1614            self._tone_dialog = None
1615
1616        dialog.rejected.connect(handle_rejected)
1617        dialog.finished.connect(handle_finished)
1618
1619        dialog.setModal(False)
1620        dialog.show()
1621        dialog.raise_()
1622        dialog.activateWindow()
1623
1624    def _setup_menu_bar(self) -> None:
1625        """Create and wire the menu bar for image-viewer actions."""
1626        config = build_menu_config_for_role(
1627            role="viewer",
1628            callbacks_map={
1629            "Open": self._open_file_dialog,
1630            "Save View": self._save_view_and_ffts,
1631            "Build Figure": lambda: self._show_not_implemented("Build Figure"),
1632            "Calibrate": self._open_calibration_dialog,
1633            "Parameters": self._open_parameters_dialog,
1634            "FFT": lambda _checked=False: self.fft_manager.add_new_fft(),
1635            "Inverse FFT": lambda _checked=False: self.fft_manager.add_new_inverse_fft(),
1636            "Adjust": self._open_adjust_dialog,
1637            "Distance": self._menu_start_distance_measurement,
1638            "History": self.measurements.show_measurement_history,
1639            "Intensity": lambda: self._show_not_implemented("Intensity"),
1640            "Profile": self._menu_start_profile_measurement,
1641            "Metadata": self._show_metadata_window,
1642            "Render Diagnostics": self._show_render_diagnostics,
1643            "Cycle Colormap Forward": self._cycle_colormap_forward,
1644            "Cycle Colormap Backward": self._cycle_colormap_backward,
1645            "Keyboard Shortcuts": self.help_actions.show_keyboard_shortcuts,
1646            "About": self.help_actions.show_about,
1647            "README": self.help_actions.show_readme,
1648            },
1649        )
1650        
1651        # Determine if an image is available for this viewer
1652        if self.view_mode == "image":
1653            image_available = self.data is not None
1654        elif self.view_mode == "fft":
1655            image_available = self._magnitude_spectrum is not None
1656        elif self.view_mode == "inverse_fft":
1657            image_available = self._inverse_fft_image is not None
1658        else:
1659            image_available = False
1660        
1661        # Build menus using the builder
1662        self.menu_builder = MenuBuilder(self, logger)
1663        self.menu_builder.build_from_config(config, image_available=image_available)
1664        
1665        # Add Colormap submenu with individual colormap options to the Display menu
1666        if "Display" in self.menu_builder.menus:
1667            display_menu = self.menu_builder.menus["Display"]
1668            colormap_submenu = display_menu.addMenu("Colormap")
1669            for cmap_name in self._available_colormaps:
1670                action = colormap_submenu.addAction(cmap_name.capitalize())
1671                action.triggered.connect(
1672                    lambda checked=False, name=cmap_name: self._set_colormap_by_name(name)
1673                )
1674                logger.debug(f"Added colormap menu item: {cmap_name}")
1675        
1676        logger.debug("Image viewer menu bar setup complete with keyboard shortcuts and colormap menu")
1677
1678
1679    def _show_not_implemented(self, feature_name: str) -> None:
1680        """Show a generic placeholder message for unfinished features.
1681
1682            Args:
1683                feature_name: Feature label shown in the not-implemented dialog.
1684        """
1685        QtWidgets.QMessageBox.information(
1686            self,
1687            feature_name,
1688            f"{feature_name} is planned but not implemented yet.",
1689        )
1690
1691    def _show_render_diagnostics(self) -> None:
1692        """Display current rendering backend and quality diagnostics."""
1693        gl_available = hardware_acceleration_available(force_refresh=True)
1694        effective = global_render_config_options(self._render_settings, hardware_available=gl_available)
1695
1696        diagnostics: list[str] = [
1697            f"Window mode: {self.view_mode}",
1698            f"File: {self.file_path}",
1699            f"Requested hardware acceleration: {bool(self._render_settings.get('use_hardware_acceleration', True))}",
1700            f"Detected OpenGL available: {gl_available}",
1701            f"Effective pyqtgraph useOpenGL (settings): {effective.get('useOpenGL')}",
1702            f"Current pyqtgraph useOpenGL (global): {pg.getConfigOption('useOpenGL')}",
1703            f"Image resampling quality: {self._render_settings.get('image_resampling_quality')}",
1704            f"QT_QPA_PLATFORM: {os.environ.get('QT_QPA_PLATFORM')}",
1705            f"QT_OPENGL: {os.environ.get('QT_OPENGL')}",
1706            f"QT_XCB_GL_INTEGRATION: {os.environ.get('QT_XCB_GL_INTEGRATION')}",
1707            f"XDG_SESSION_TYPE: {os.environ.get('XDG_SESSION_TYPE')}",
1708            f"WAYLAND_DISPLAY: {os.environ.get('WAYLAND_DISPLAY')}",
1709            f"DISPLAY: {os.environ.get('DISPLAY')}",
1710            f"Graphics widget class: {type(self.glw).__name__ if self.glw is not None else 'None'}",
1711            f"Image item class: {type(self.img_orig).__name__ if self.img_orig is not None else 'None'}",
1712        ]
1713
1714        if self._display_image_full_res is not None:
1715            diagnostics.append(f"Display image shape: {self._display_image_full_res.shape}")
1716            diagnostics.append(f"Display image dtype: {self._display_image_full_res.dtype}")
1717
1718        if self._source_region is not None:
1719            diagnostics.append(f"Source region shape: {self._source_region.shape}")
1720            diagnostics.append(f"Source region dtype: {self._source_region.dtype}")
1721
1722        if self._magnitude_spectrum is not None:
1723            diagnostics.append(f"FFT magnitude shape: {self._magnitude_spectrum.shape}")
1724
1725        if self._inverse_fft_image is not None:
1726            diagnostics.append(f"iFFT image shape: {self._inverse_fft_image.shape}")
1727
1728        details = "\n".join(diagnostics)
1729        logger.debug("Render diagnostics requested:\n%s", details)
1730
1731        # Create a non-modal, resizable dialog
1732        dialog = QtWidgets.QDialog(self, QtCore.Qt.Window)
1733        dialog.setWindowTitle("Render Diagnostics")
1734        dialog.setWindowModality(QtCore.Qt.NonModal)
1735        dialog.setAttribute(QtCore.Qt.WA_DeleteOnClose)
1736        dialog.resize(600, 400)
1737
1738        layout = QtWidgets.QVBoxLayout()
1739
1740        lab_title = QtWidgets.QLabel("Render diagnostics for current window")
1741        layout.addWidget(lab_title)
1742
1743        text_edit = QtWidgets.QTextEdit()
1744        text_edit.setReadOnly(True)
1745        text_edit.setPlainText(details)
1746        text_edit.setFontFamily("Courier")
1747        layout.addWidget(text_edit)
1748
1749        btn_close = QtWidgets.QPushButton("Close")
1750        btn_close.clicked.connect(dialog.close)
1751        layout.addWidget(btn_close)
1752
1753        dialog.setLayout(layout)
1754        dialog.show()
1755
1756    def _open_parameters_dialog(self) -> None:
1757        """Open render-parameter dialog and apply accepted settings."""
1758        current = load_render_settings()
1759        updated = open_parameters_dialog(self, current)
1760        if updated is None:
1761            return
1762
1763        save_render_settings(updated)
1764        self._render_settings = updated
1765        gl_available = hardware_acceleration_available()
1766        pg.setConfigOptions(
1767            **global_render_config_options(updated, hardware_available=gl_available)
1768        )
1769        self._apply_render_preferences_to_view()
1770        self._update_image_display()
1771
1772    def _open_file_dialog(self) -> None:
1773        """Open file picker and load selected image into a new viewer window."""
1774        start_dir = str(Path(self.file_path).parent) if self.file_path else str(Path.cwd())
1775        selected_file = open_file_dialog(self, start_dir)
1776        if selected_file:
1777            open_image_file(selected_file)
1778
1779    def _menu_start_distance_measurement(self) -> None:
1780        """Handle menu action that starts distance measurement mode."""
1781        logger.debug("Menu action: start distance measurement")
1782        self.measurements.start_distance_measurement()
1783
1784    def _menu_start_profile_measurement(self) -> None:
1785        """Handle menu action that starts profile measurement mode."""
1786        logger.debug("Menu action: start profile measurement")
1787        self.measurements.start_profile_measurement()
1788    
1789
1790    def _iter_transform_windows_recursive(self):
1791        """Yield all descendant FFT/iFFT windows for this image file."""
1792        visited: set[int] = set()
1793        stack: list["ImageViewerWindow"] = []
1794        stack.extend(self.fft_windows or [])
1795        stack.extend(self.inverse_fft_windows or [])
1796
1797        while stack:
1798            win = stack.pop()
1799            if win is None:
1800                continue
1801
1802            win_id = id(win)
1803            if win_id in visited:
1804                continue
1805            visited.add(win_id)
1806
1807            try:
1808                mode = getattr(win, "view_mode", None)
1809                same_file = getattr(win, "file_path", None) == self.file_path
1810                if same_file and mode in {"fft", "inverse_fft"}:
1811                    yield win
1812
1813                stack.extend(getattr(win, "fft_windows", []) or [])
1814                stack.extend(getattr(win, "inverse_fft_windows", []) or [])
1815            except RuntimeError:
1816                # Qt object may already be deleted
1817                continue
1818
1819    
1820    def _child_transform_segment(self, parent: "ImageViewerWindow", child: "ImageViewerWindow") -> str:
1821        """Return child segment label relative to parent, e.g. FFT0 or iFFT0.
1822
1823            Args:
1824                parent: Optional parent widget that owns the dialog window.
1825                child: Child transform window being evaluated in the export tree.
1826
1827            Returns:
1828                Human-readable segment describing how a child transform derives from its parent.
1829        """
1830        try:
1831            for i, w in enumerate(parent.fft_windows or []):
1832                if w is child:
1833                    return f"FFT{i}"
1834            for i, w in enumerate(parent.inverse_fft_windows or []):
1835                if w is child:
1836                    return f"iFFT{i}"
1837        except RuntimeError:
1838            pass
1839
1840        # Fallback if linkage lists are stale
1841        mode = getattr(child, "view_mode", "")
1842        return "iFFT0" if mode == "inverse_fft" else "FFT0"
1843
1844    def _transform_chain_label(self, window: "ImageViewerWindow") -> str:
1845        """Build chain label from this root window to target transform window.
1846
1847            Args:
1848                window: Transform window for which a chain label is being generated.
1849
1850            Returns:
1851                Full transform lineage label used in exported overlays and diagnostics.
1852        """
1853        parts: list[str] = []
1854        cur = window
1855        visited: set[int] = set()
1856
1857        while cur is not None and cur is not self:
1858            cur_id = id(cur)
1859            if cur_id in visited:
1860                break
1861            visited.add(cur_id)
1862
1863            parent = getattr(cur, "parent_image_window", None)
1864            if parent is None:
1865                break
1866
