1867            parts.append(self._child_transform_segment(parent, cur))
1868            cur = parent
1869
1870        parts.reverse()
1871        return "-".join(parts) if parts else "oops"
1872
1873    def _save_view_and_ffts(self) -> None:
1874        """Save the current view (with annotations) and any FFT windows and their children, recursively.
1875
1876        The main image view is saved in a user-selected format (PNG, TIFF,
1877        or JPEG). All FFT views are saved as PNG files.
1878        """
1879
1880        if self.data is None or self.glw is None:
1881            QtWidgets.QMessageBox.information(
1882                self,
1883                "Save Images",
1884                "No image is currently loaded to save.",
1885            )
1886            return
1887        logger.debug("Saving view/FFTs for file: %s", self.file_path)
1888
1889        # Choose output directory
1890        try:
1891            default_dir = str(Path(self.file_path).parent)
1892        except Exception:
1893            default_dir = str(Path.cwd())
1894
1895        directory = QtWidgets.QFileDialog.getExistingDirectory(
1896            self,
1897            "Select Output Directory",
1898            default_dir,
1899        )
1900        if not directory:
1901            return
1902
1903        directory_path = Path(directory)
1904
1905        # Choose base name
1906        suggested_base = Path(self.file_path).stem or "image"
1907        base_name, ok = QtWidgets.QInputDialog.getText(
1908            self,
1909            "Base File Name",
1910            "Base name for saved images:",
1911            text=suggested_base,
1912        )
1913        if not ok:
1914            return
1915        base_name = base_name.strip()
1916        if not base_name:
1917            QtWidgets.QMessageBox.information(
1918                self,
1919                "Save Images",
1920                "Base name cannot be empty.",
1921            )
1922            return
1923
1924        # Choose format for main view
1925        format_labels = ["PNG (.png)", "TIFF (.tif)", "JPEG (.jpg)"]
1926        format_map = {
1927            0: ("PNG", ".png"),
1928            1: ("TIFF", ".tif"),
1929            2: ("JPEG", ".jpg"),
1930        }
1931
1932        fmt_label, ok = QtWidgets.QInputDialog.getItem(
1933            self,
1934            "Image Format",
1935            "Format for main view:",
1936            format_labels,
1937            0,
1938            False,
1939        )
1940        if not ok:
1941            return
1942
1943        try:
1944            fmt_index = format_labels.index(fmt_label)
1945        except ValueError:
1946            QtWidgets.QMessageBox.warning(
1947                self,
1948                "Save Images",
1949                "Unknown image format selected.",
1950            )
1951            return
1952
1953        fmt_name, ext = format_map.get(fmt_index, ("PNG", ".png"))
1954
1955        # Compose extra label for export using metadata (file, instrument,
1956        # acquisition mode, and AcquireDate from original metadata).
1957        overlay_label = self._build_export_overlay_label()
1958
1959        # Temporarily overlay metadata label above the scale bar during export
1960        extra_label_applied = False
1961        if self.scale_bar is not None and hasattr(self.scale_bar, "set_extra_label"):
1962            try:
1963                self.scale_bar.set_extra_label(overlay_label)
1964                extra_label_applied = True
1965            except Exception:
1966                extra_label_applied = False
1967
1968        # Capture main view (graphics widget) including annotations and label
1969        try:
1970            pixmap = self.glw.grab()
1971        except Exception as e:
1972            # Clean up overlay on failure
1973            if extra_label_applied:
1974                try:
1975                    self.scale_bar.set_extra_label(None)  # type: ignore[union-attr]
1976                except Exception:
1977                    pass
1978            QtWidgets.QMessageBox.critical(
1979                self,
1980                "Save Images",
1981                f"Failed to capture main view: {e}",
1982            )
1983            return
1984
1985        main_path = directory_path / f"{base_name}_view{ext}"
1986        if not pixmap.save(str(main_path), fmt_name):
1987            QtWidgets.QMessageBox.warning(
1988                self,
1989                "Save Images",
1990                f"Failed to save main view to {main_path}.",
1991            )
1992        else:
1993            logger.debug("Saved main view: %s (%s)", main_path, fmt_name)
1994
1995        # Remove temporary overlay label after saving
1996        if extra_label_applied:
1997            try:
1998                self.scale_bar.set_extra_label(None)  # type: ignore[union-attr]
1999            except Exception:
2000                pass
2001
2002        # Capture all open FFT windows as PNGs, with metadata + ROI label
2003        fft_saved = 0
2004        transform_windows = list(self._iter_transform_windows_recursive())
2005        for idx, fft_window in enumerate(transform_windows, start=1):
2006            # Build label: metadata summary and ROI number (from fft_name)
2007            parent_window = getattr(fft_window, "parent_image_window", None)
2008            base_label = None
2009            if parent_window is self:
2010                base_label = overlay_label
2011            elif parent_window is not None and hasattr(parent_window, "_build_export_overlay_label"):
2012                try:
2013                    base_label = parent_window._build_export_overlay_label()
2014                except Exception:
2015                    base_label = None
2016
2017            if not base_label:
2018                # Fallback to file name if we cannot get metadata
2019                try:
2020                    parent_file = getattr(parent_window, "file_path", None)
2021                    base_label = Path(parent_file).name if parent_file else "image"
2022                except Exception:
2023                    base_label = "image"
2024
2025            roi_label = getattr(fft_window, "fft_name", f"FFT {idx}")
2026            extra_label = f"{base_label} | {roi_label}"
2027
2028            extra_label_applied_fft = False
2029            scale_bar = getattr(fft_window, "scale_bar", None)
2030            if scale_bar is not None and hasattr(scale_bar, "set_extra_label"):
2031                try:
2032                    scale_bar.set_extra_label(extra_label)
2033                    extra_label_applied_fft = True
2034                except Exception:
2035                    extra_label_applied_fft = False
2036
2037            # Grab only the FFT view (graphics widget) so that
2038            # window chrome and buttons are not included, mirroring
2039            # how the main image view is exported.
2040            try:
2041                fft_view_widget = getattr(fft_window, "glw", fft_window)
2042                fft_pixmap = fft_view_widget.grab()
2043            except Exception:
2044                if extra_label_applied_fft:
2045                    try:
2046                        scale_bar.set_extra_label(None)  # type: ignore[union-attr]
2047                    except Exception:
2048                        pass
2049                continue
2050
2051            chain = self._transform_chain_label(fft_window)
2052            fft_path = directory_path / f"{base_name}_{chain}.png"
2053            if fft_pixmap.save(str(fft_path), "PNG"):
2054                fft_saved += 1
2055                logger.debug("Saved FFT view: %s", fft_path)
2056
2057            # Remove temporary overlay label after saving
2058            if extra_label_applied_fft:
2059                try:
2060                    scale_bar.set_extra_label(None)  # type: ignore[union-attr]
2061                except Exception:
2062                    pass
2063
2064        message_lines = [f"Saved main view to:\n{main_path}"]
2065        if fft_saved:
2066            message_lines.append(f"Saved {fft_saved} FFT view PNG file(s).")
2067        else:
2068            message_lines.append(
2069                "No FFT windows were open; only the main view was saved."
2070            )
2071
2072        QtWidgets.QMessageBox.information(
2073            self,
2074            "Save Images",
2075            "\n".join(message_lines),
2076        )
2077
2078    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
2079    # Metadata helpers for export overlays
2080    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
2081
2082    def _build_export_overlay_label(self) -> str:
2083        """Return a one-line label for export overlays.
2084
2085            Returns:
2086                Overlay label string containing file and transform context for export.
2087        """
2088
2089        # File name
2090        try:
2091            file_name = Path(self.file_path).name if self.file_path else "image"
2092        except Exception:
2093            file_name = "image"
2094
2095        microscope_tag = ""
2096        mode_tag = ""
2097        acq_date = ""
2098
2099        raw_meta = self._get_original_metadata_dict()
2100        if isinstance(raw_meta, dict):
2101            obj_info = (
2102                raw_meta.get("ObjectInfo")
2103                or raw_meta.get("objectInfo")
2104                or raw_meta.get("object_info")
2105            )
2106
2107            if isinstance(obj_info, dict):
2108                # AcquireDate: full string
2109                acq_val = (
2110                    obj_info.get("AcquireDate")
2111                    or obj_info.get("acquiredate")
2112                    or obj_info.get("Acquiredate")
2113                )
2114                if acq_val:
2115                    acq_date = str(acq_val)
2116
2117                # ExperimentalDescription contains Microscope + Mode
2118                exp_desc = (
2119                    obj_info.get("ExperimentalDescription")
2120                    or obj_info.get("experimentaldescription")
2121                    or obj_info.get("experimental_description")
2122                )
2123
2124                if isinstance(exp_desc, dict):
2125                    # Microscope: take second word
2126                    microscope_val = (
2127                        exp_desc.get("Microscope")
2128                        or exp_desc.get("microscope")
2129                    )
2130                    if isinstance(microscope_val, str):
2131                        words = microscope_val.split()
2132                        if len(words) >= 2:
2133                            microscope_tag = words[1]
2134
2135                    # Mode: take first word
2136                    mode_val = exp_desc.get("Mode") or exp_desc.get("mode")
2137                    if isinstance(mode_val, str):
2138                        parts = mode_val.strip().split()
2139                        if parts:
2140                            mode_tag = parts[0]
2141
2142        parts = [file_name]
2143        if microscope_tag:
2144            parts.append(microscope_tag)
2145        if mode_tag:
2146            parts.append(mode_tag)
2147        if acq_date:
2148            parts.append(acq_date)
2149
2150        return " | ".join(str(p) for p in parts if p)
2151
2152    def _show_metadata_window(self):
2153        """Open or refresh the metadata window for the current signal."""
2154        if self.signal is None:
2155            QtWidgets.QMessageBox.information(
2156                self, "Metadata", "No metadata available for this image."
2157            )
2158            return
2159
2160        raw_metadata = self._get_original_metadata_dict()
2161        cleaned_metadata = None
2162        if self.signal is not None and hasattr(self.signal, "metadata"):
2163            try:
2164                cleaned_metadata = self.signal.metadata.as_dictionary()
2165            except Exception:
2166                cleaned_metadata = None
2167
2168        file_name = Path(self.file_path).name
2169        title = f"Metadata - {file_name}"
2170
2171        if self.metadata_window is None:
2172            self.metadata_window = MetadataWindow(
2173                self,
2174                title=title,
2175                raw_metadata=raw_metadata,
2176                cleaned_metadata=cleaned_metadata,
2177            )
2178        else:
2179            self.metadata_window.setWindowTitle(title)
2180            self.metadata_window.update_metadata(
2181                raw_metadata=raw_metadata,
2182                cleaned_metadata=cleaned_metadata,
2183            )
2184
2185        self.metadata_window.show()
2186        self.metadata_window.raise_()
2187        self.metadata_window.activateWindow()
FFT_COLORS = ['r', 'g', 'b', 'y', 'c', 'm']
DEFAULT_IMAGE_WINDOW_SIZE = (1000, 900)
DEFAULT_FFT_WINDOW_SIZE = (700, 700)
logger = <Logger image_viewer (WARNING)>
class ImageViewerWindow(PyQt5.QtWidgets.QMainWindow): 
  69class ImageViewerWindow(QtWidgets.QMainWindow):
  70    """Window for viewing and analyzing a single image with FFT boxes."""
  71
  72    def __init__(
  73        self,
  74        file_path: str,
  75        signal=None,
  76        window_suffix: Optional[str] = None,
  77        view_mode: str = "image",
  78        source_region: Optional[np.ndarray] = None,
  79        fft_region: Optional[np.ndarray] = None,
  80        fft_name: Optional[str] = None,
  81        parent_image_window: Optional["ImageViewerWindow"] = None,
  82    ):
  83        """Initialize an image viewer window for displaying TEM images and measurements.
  84        
  85        Args:
  86            file_path: Path to the source image file.
  87            signal: HyperSpy Signal object to display. If None, loaded from file_path.
  88            window_suffix: Optional suffix to append to window title (e.g., for multi-image files).
  89            view_mode: Display mode - "image" for direct view or "fft" for Fourier transform.
  90            source_region: Optional array specifying source region for FFT windows.
  91            fft_region: Optional array specifying FFT region for inverse FFT windows.
  92            fft_name: Optional name/label for FFT windows.
  93            parent_image_window: Reference to parent viewer for FFT/inverse FFT relationships.
  94        """
  95        super().__init__()
  96        self.setAcceptDrops(True)
  97        self.file_path = file_path
  98        self.view_mode = view_mode
  99        self.signal = None
 100        self.data = None
 101        self.ax_x = None
 102        self.ax_y = None
 103        self.p1 = None
 104        self.img_orig = None
 105        self.glw = None
 106        self.fft_boxes: List[pg.RectROI] = []
 107        self.fft_count = 0
 108        self.is_reciprocal_space = False
 109        self.line_tool: Optional[LineDrawingTool] = None
 110        self.fft_windows: List["ImageViewerWindow"] = []
 111        self.fft_to_fft_window: Dict[pg.RectROI, "ImageViewerWindow"] = {}
 112        self.fft_box_meta: Dict[pg.RectROI, Dict[str, object]] = {}
 113        self.selected_fft_box: Optional[pg.RectROI] = None
 114        self.inverse_fft_windows: List["ImageViewerWindow"] = []
 115        self.inverse_fft_to_window: Dict[pg.RectROI, "ImageViewerWindow"] = {}
 116        self.inverse_fft_box_meta: Dict[pg.RectROI, Dict[str, object]] = {}
 117        self.inverse_fft_boxes: List[pg.RectROI] = []
 118        self.inverse_fft_count = 0
 119        self.selected_inverse_fft_box: Optional[pg.RectROI] = None
 120        self.scale_bar: Optional[DynamicScaleBar] = None
 121        self.measurement_history_window: Optional[MeasurementHistoryWindow] = None
 122        self.metadata_window: Optional[MetadataWindow] = None
 123        self.measurement_count = 0
 124        self.profile_measurement_count = 0
 125        self.btn_measure: Optional[QtWidgets.QPushButton] = None
 126        self.measurement_items: List[Tuple[int, pg.PlotDataItem, pg.TextItem]] = []
 127        self.profile_measurement_items: Dict[int, Dict[str, Any]] = {}
 128        self.selected_measurement_index: Optional[int] = None
 129
 130        # Colormap state for the main image view
 131        self._available_colormaps: List[str] = [
 132            "gray",
 133            "viridis",
 134            "plasma",
 135            "magma",
 136            "inferno",
 137            "cividis",
 138        ]
 139        self._current_colormap_index: int = 0
 140        self.btn_colormap: Optional[QtWidgets.QAbstractButton] = None
 141
 142        # Vim-style command line (":" commands)
 143        self.command_edit: Optional[QtWidgets.QLineEdit] = None
 144
 145        self.display_min: Optional[float] = None
 146        self.display_max: Optional[float] = None
 147        self.display_gamma: float = 1.0
 148        self._tone_dialog: Optional[ToneCurveDialog] = None
 149
 150        self.fft_name = fft_name
 151        self.parent_image_window = parent_image_window
 152        self._magnitude_spectrum = None
 153        self._fft_complex = None
 154        self._inverse_fft_cache = None
 155        self._inverse_fft_image = None
 156        self._nyq_x = None
 157        self._nyq_y = None
 158        self._last_region_id = None
 159        self._source_region = source_region if source_region is not None else fft_region
 160        self._fft_region = self._source_region
 161        self.freq_axis_base_unit: str = "m"
 162        self._calibration_status: str = "metadata"
 163        self._manual_calibrated: bool = False
 164        self._line_draw_mode: str = "measurement"
 165        self._calibration_dialog_state: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None
 166        self._on_calibration_pixels_selected: Optional[Callable[[float], None]] = None
 167        self._base_window_title: str = ""
 168        self._render_settings: Dict[str, Any] = get_effective_render_settings()
 169        self._mipmap_levels: List[np.ndarray] = []
 170        self._current_mipmap_level: int = -1
 171        self._display_image_full_res: Optional[np.ndarray] = None
 172        self.measurements = MeasurementController(self, logger)
 173        self.fft_manager = FFTWindowManager(self, logger, FFT_COLORS)
 174        self.commands = ViewerCommandRouter(self, logger)
 175        self._command_mode = CommandModeController(
 176            command_edit_getter=lambda: self.command_edit,
 177            run_command=self.commands.run_vim_command,
 178            on_unknown_command=lambda cmd: QtWidgets.QMessageBox.information(
 179                self,
 180                "Command",
 181                f"Unknown command: {cmd}",
 182            ),
 183            focus_target_getter=lambda: self.glw if hasattr(self.glw, "setFocus") else None,
 184        )
 185        self.help_actions = HelpDialogActions(
 186            parent_widget=self,
 187            menu_config_provider=lambda: build_menu_config_for_role(role="viewer", callbacks_map={}),
 188            extra_shortcuts_provider=lambda: {
 189                "Enter command mode": ":",
 190                "Exit command mode": "Esc",
 191                "Delete selected ROI": "Delete",
 192            },
 193            additional_colormaps_provider=lambda: self._available_colormaps,
 194            logger_instance=logger,
 195        )
 196
 197        if self.view_mode in {"fft", "inverse_fft"}:
 198            self._setup_transform_view()
 199        elif signal is not None:
 200            self._setup_from_signal(signal, window_suffix)
 201        else:
 202            self._load_and_setup()
 203
 204        # Install a global key event filter so we can capture ':'
 205        # even when the plot widget has focus.
 206        app = QtWidgets.QApplication.instance()
 207        if app is not None:
 208            app.installEventFilter(self)
 209
 210    # Drag and drop -----------------------------------------------------
 211
 212    def dragEnterEvent(self, event: QtGui.QDragEnterEvent):  # type: ignore[override]
 213        """Accept drag events for image files.
 214
 215                        Args:
 216                            event: Qt event object carrying user interaction details.
 217                    
 218        """
 219        if event.mimeData().hasUrls():
 220            event.acceptProposedAction()
 221
 222    def dropEvent(self, event: QtGui.QDropEvent):  # type: ignore[override]
 223        """Handle dropped local files and open valid image paths.
 224
 225                        Args:
 226                            event: Qt event object carrying user interaction details.
 227                    
 228        """
 229        from pathlib import Path as _Path
 230
 231        for url in event.mimeData().urls():
 232            file_path = url.toLocalFile()
 233            if not file_path:
 234                continue
 235            try:
 236                if not _Path(file_path).is_file():
 237                    continue
 238            except Exception:
 239                continue
 240
 241            open_image_file(file_path)
 242
 243    # Loading and setup -------------------------------------------------
 244
 245    def _load_and_setup(self):
 246        """Load the image signal from disk and initialize viewer state."""
 247        try:
 248            logger.debug("Loading image via HyperSpy: %s", self.file_path)
 249            s = hs.load(self.file_path)
 250            if s.axes_manager.navigation_dimension != 0:
 251                logger.debug(
 252                    "Loaded signal has navigation_dimension=%s; using first navigation element",
 253                    s.axes_manager.navigation_dimension,
 254                )
 255                s = s.inav[0, 0]
 256            self._setup_from_signal(s)
 257            logger.debug("Image setup complete for: %s", self.file_path)
 258        except Exception as e:
 259            logger.exception("Failed to load file: %s", self.file_path)
 260            QtWidgets.QMessageBox.critical(self, "Error Loading File", str(e))
 261
 262    def _setup_from_signal(self, signal, window_suffix: Optional[str] = None):
 263        """Initialize viewer data, calibration, and display mode from a signal.
 264
 265            Args:
 266                signal: HyperSpy signal containing image data, axes, and metadata.
 267                window_suffix: Optional suffix appended to the window title for derived views.
 268        """
 269        self.signal = signal
 270        self.data = signal.data
 271        self.ax_x = signal.axes_manager[0]
 272        self.ax_y = signal.axes_manager[1]
 273
 274        calibrated = self._apply_calibration_from_original_metadata()
 275        if not calibrated:
 276            self._calibration_status = "uncalibrated"
 277            logger.debug("Startup metadata calibration failed; entering uncalibrated mode")
 278            QtWidgets.QMessageBox.warning(
 279                self,
 280                "Calibration",
 281                "This image could not be calibrated successfully from metadata; "
 282                "using default pixel scaling instead.",
 283            )
 284        else:
 285            self._calibration_status = "metadata"
 286            logger.debug("Startup metadata calibration applied successfully")
 287
 288        # Decide whether this view should be treated as reciprocal space.
 289        # Prefer explicit metadata / axis units when available so that
 290        # multiple images from the same file are classified consistently,
 291        # falling back to an image‑content heuristic only as a last resort.
 292        self.is_reciprocal_space = self._detect_reciprocal_space(signal)
 293        logger.debug(
 294            "Signal setup: shape=%s units=(%s,%s) reciprocal=%s",
 295            getattr(self.data, "shape", None),
 296            getattr(self.ax_x, "units", None),
 297            getattr(self.ax_y, "units", None),
 298            self.is_reciprocal_space,
 299        )
 300
 301        self._init_display_window()
 302
 303        file_name = Path(self.file_path).stem
 304        if window_suffix:
 305            title = f"Image Viewer - {file_name} {window_suffix}"
 306        else:
 307            title = f"Image Viewer - {file_name}"
 308        self._set_base_window_title(title)
 309
 310        self.setup_ui()
 311        self.resize(*DEFAULT_IMAGE_WINDOW_SIZE)
 312
 313
 314    def _setup_transform_view(self):
 315        """Initialize this window as an FFT or inverse-FFT transform view."""
 316        if self._source_region is None:
 317            QtWidgets.QMessageBox.critical(self, "FFT", "Could not create transform view: missing ROI data.")
 318            self.close()
 319            return
 320
 321        logger.debug(
 322            "Setting up transform view: mode=%s source_shape=%s source_dtype=%s",
 323            self.view_mode,
 324            getattr(self._source_region, "shape", None),
 325            getattr(self._source_region, "dtype", None),
 326        )
 327
 328        parent = self.parent_image_window
 329        if parent is None or parent.ax_x is None or parent.ax_y is None:
 330            QtWidgets.QMessageBox.critical(self, "FFT", "Could not create transform view: missing parent calibration.")
 331            self.close()
 332            return
 333
 334        is_fft_view = self.view_mode == "fft"
 335        self.is_reciprocal_space = is_fft_view
 336        self.ax_x = parent.ax_x
 337        self.ax_y = parent.ax_y
 338        self.freq_axis_base_unit = self.ax_x.units or "m"
 339
 340        parent_title = parent.windowTitle().replace("Image Viewer - ", "")
 341        default_name = "FFT" if is_fft_view else "iFFT"
 342        display_name = self.fft_name or default_name
 343        self._set_base_window_title(f"Image Viewer - {parent_title} - {display_name}")
 344
 345        self._refresh_transform_data()
 346        if self.view_mode == "fft":
 347            self.data = self._magnitude_spectrum # set the image date to the magnitude spectrum for the FFT view
 348        elif self.view_mode == "inverse_fft":
 349            self.data = self._inverse_fft_image # set the image data to the inverse FFT result for the iFFT view
 350        else:
 351            QtWidgets.QMessageBox.critical(self, "FFT", f"Unknown transform view mode: {self.view_mode}")
 352            self.close()
 353            return
 354        self._init_display_window()
 355        self.setup_ui()
 356        self.resize(*DEFAULT_FFT_WINDOW_SIZE)
 357
 358    def _get_original_metadata_dict(self) -> Optional[dict]:
 359        """Return original metadata dictionary for the current signal.
 360
 361            Returns:
 362                Computed result produced by this operation.
 363        """
 364        return self._get_original_metadata_dict_from_signal(self.signal)
 365
 366    def _get_original_metadata_dict_from_signal(self, signal) -> Optional[dict]:
 367        """Return original metadata dictionary from a provided signal object.
 368
 369            Args:
 370                signal: HyperSpy signal containing image data, axes, and metadata.
 371
 372            Returns:
 373                Computed result produced by this operation.
 374        """
 375        if signal is None:
 376            return None
 377
 378        original_meta = None
 379
 380        if hasattr(signal, "original_metadata"):
 381            original_meta = signal.original_metadata
 382        elif hasattr(signal.metadata, "original_metadata"):
 383            original_meta = signal.metadata.original_metadata
 384
 385        if original_meta is None:
 386            return None
 387
 388        if hasattr(original_meta, "as_dictionary"):
 389            return original_meta.as_dictionary()
 390
 391        try:
 392            return dict(original_meta)
 393        except Exception:
 394            return None
 395
 396    def _extract_ser_calibration(self, meta: dict) -> Optional[Tuple[float, float, Optional[float], Optional[float]]]:
 397        """Extract calibration deltas/offsets from SER reader metadata.
 398
 399            Args:
 400                meta: Metadata dictionary extracted from image headers or HyperSpy objects.
 401
 402            Returns:
 403                Tuple of (dx, dy, ox, oy) calibration values, or None when metadata is incomplete.
 404        """
 405        ser_params = None
 406        if "ser_header_parameters" in meta:
 407            ser_params = meta["ser_header_parameters"]
 408        else:
 409            for key, value in meta.items():
 410                if isinstance(key, str) and key.lower() == "ser_header_parameters":
 411                    ser_params = value
 412                    break
 413
 414        if not isinstance(ser_params, dict):
 415            logger.debug("Calibration metadata missing ser_header_parameters")
 416            return None
 417
 418        dx = ser_params.get("CalibrationDeltaX")
 419        dy = ser_params.get("CalibrationDeltaY")
 420        if not (isinstance(dx, (int, float)) and isinstance(dy, (int, float))):
 421            logger.debug("Calibration metadata has invalid deltas: dx=%r dy=%r", dx, dy)
 422            return None
 423        if dx <= 0 or dy <= 0:
 424            logger.debug("Calibration metadata deltas must be positive: dx=%r dy=%r", dx, dy)
 425            return None
 426
 427        ox = ser_params.get("CalibrationOffsetX")
 428        oy = ser_params.get("CalibrationOffsetY")
 429        out_ox = float(ox) if isinstance(ox, (int, float)) else None
 430        out_oy = float(oy) if isinstance(oy, (int, float)) else None
 431
 432        return float(dx), float(dy), out_ox, out_oy
 433
 434    def _apply_axis_calibration_values(
 435        self,
 436        dx: float,
 437        dy: float,
 438        units: str,
 439        ox: Optional[float] = None,
 440        oy: Optional[float] = None,
 441        source: str = "unknown",
 442    ) -> bool:
 443        """Apply axis scale/unit/offset calibration values to both plot axes.
 444
 445            Args:
 446                dx: Calibrated pixel spacing along the x-axis in physical units.
 447                dy: Calibrated pixel spacing along the y-axis in physical units.
 448                units: Physical unit label applied to both image axes.
 449                ox: Optional x-axis origin offset in calibrated units.
 450                oy: Optional y-axis origin offset in calibrated units.
 451                source: Human-readable source label used in diagnostics and logs.
 452
 453            Returns:
 454                True when axis scales/offsets are applied successfully; otherwise False.
 455        """
 456        if self.ax_x is None or self.ax_y is None:
 457            logger.debug("Skipping axis calibration apply (%s): axes unavailable", source)
 458            return False
 459
 460        try:
 461            self.ax_x.scale = float(dx)
 462            self.ax_y.scale = float(dy)
 463            self.ax_x.units = units
 464            self.ax_y.units = units
 465
 466            if ox is not None:
 467                self.ax_x.offset = float(ox)
 468            if oy is not None:
 469                self.ax_y.offset = float(oy)
 470        except Exception:
 471            logger.exception("Failed applying axis calibration (%s)", source)
 472            return False
 473
 474        logger.debug(
 475            "Applied axis calibration (%s): scale_x=%s scale_y=%s units=%s offset_x=%s offset_y=%s",
 476            source,
 477            dx,
 478            dy,
 479            units,
 480            ox,
 481            oy,
 482        )
 483        return True
 484
 485    def _apply_calibration_from_original_metadata(
 486        self,
 487        meta_override: Optional[dict] = None,
 488        source: str = "signal metadata",
 489    ) -> bool:
 490        """Apply SER calibration values extracted from original metadata.
 491
 492            Args:
 493                meta_override: Optional metadata dictionary used instead of signal metadata.
 494                source: Human-readable source label used in diagnostics and logs.
 495
 496            Returns:
 497                True when usable calibration metadata is found and applied.
 498        """
 499        meta = meta_override if meta_override is not None else self._get_original_metadata_dict()
 500        if not meta:
 501            logger.debug("No original metadata available for calibration (%s)", source)
 502            return False
 503
 504        extracted = self._extract_ser_calibration(meta)
 505        if extracted is None:
 506            logger.debug("Could not extract calibration values from metadata (%s)", source)
 507            return False
 508
 509        dx, dy, ox, oy = extracted
 510        return self._apply_axis_calibration_values(dx, dy, "m", ox=ox, oy=oy, source=source)
 511
 512    def _reload_calibration_from_file_metadata(self) -> bool:
 513        """Reload pixel calibration from the source image file metadata.
 514        
 515        Returns:
 516            True if calibration was successfully loaded, False otherwise.
 517        """
 518        if not self.file_path:
 519            logger.debug("Cannot reload metadata calibration: file_path is empty")
 520            return False
 521
 522        logger.debug("Reloading calibration metadata from file: %s", self.file_path)
 523        try:
 524            signal = hs.load(self.file_path)
 525            if signal.axes_manager.navigation_dimension != 0:
 526                signal = signal.inav[0, 0]
 527        except Exception:
 528            logger.exception("Failed to load file for metadata calibration reload: %s", self.file_path)
 529            return False
 530
 531        meta = self._get_original_metadata_dict_from_signal(signal)
 532        ok = self._apply_calibration_from_original_metadata(
 533            meta_override=meta,
 534            source="file metadata reload",
 535        )
 536        logger.debug("Metadata calibration reload result: success=%s", ok)
 537        return ok
 538
 539
 540    def _open_calibration_dialog(self, initial_state: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None) -> None:
 541        """Open the interactive calibration dialog for setting pixel size manually.
 542        
 543        Args:
 544            initial_state: Optional dict with initial calibration values.
 545        """
 546        if self.view_mode != "image" or self.ax_x is None or self.ax_y is None:
 547            QtWidgets.QMessageBox.information(
 548                self,
 549                "Parameters",
 550                "Calibration parameters are only editable for image views.",
 551            )
 552            return
 553
 554        logger.debug("Opening calibration dialog: initial_state_keys=%s", sorted((initial_state or {}).keys()))
 555
 556        state = dict(initial_state or {})
 557        current_scale_x = float(self.ax_x.scale)
 558        current_scale_y = float(self.ax_y.scale)
 559        default_ppu_x = calibration_logic.default_pixels_per_unit(current_scale_x)
 560        default_ppu_y = calibration_logic.default_pixels_per_unit(current_scale_y)
 561
 562        dialog = QtWidgets.QDialog(self)
 563        dialog.setWindowTitle("Parameters")
 564        layout = QtWidgets.QFormLayout(dialog)
 565
 566        unit_default = unit_utils.normalize_axis_unit(self.ax_x.units, default="nm")
 567
 568        edit_ppu_x = QtWidgets.QLineEdit(f"{float(state.get('ppu_x', default_ppu_x)):.12g}")
 569        edit_ppu_y = QtWidgets.QLineEdit(f"{float(state.get('ppu_y', default_ppu_y)):.12g}")
 570        edit_units = QtWidgets.QLineEdit(str(state.get("units", unit_default)))
 571        edit_ref_pixels = QtWidgets.QLineEdit(f"{float(state.get('reference_pixels', 0.0)):.12g}")
 572        initial_ref_distance = state.get("reference_distance")
 573        if initial_ref_distance is None:
 574            initial_ref_distance = f"{float(state.get('reference_units', 1.0)):.12g}"
 575        edit_ref_distance = QtWidgets.QLineEdit(str(initial_ref_distance))
 576        chk_lock_ratio = QtWidgets.QCheckBox("Lock X/Y pixel ratio")
 577        chk_lock_ratio.setChecked(bool(state.get("lock_xy", True)))
 578        lbl_ref_error = QtWidgets.QLabel("")
 579        lbl_ref_error.setStyleSheet("color: #d32f2f;")
 580        lbl_ref_error.setVisible(False)
 581
 582        def set_ref_error(message: Optional[str]) -> None:
 583            text = (message or "").strip()
 584            lbl_ref_error.setText(text)
 585            lbl_ref_error.setVisible(bool(text))
 586            if text:
 587                logger.debug("Calibration reference validation message: %s", text)
 588
 589        def sync_locked_ppu() -> None:
 590            if chk_lock_ratio.isChecked():
 591                edit_ppu_y.setText(edit_ppu_x.text().strip())
 592                edit_ppu_y.setEnabled(False)
 593            else:
 594                edit_ppu_y.setEnabled(True)
 595
 596        def update_ppu_from_reference() -> None:
 597            result = calibration_logic.parse_reference_ppu(
 598                reference_pixels_text=edit_ref_pixels.text(),
 599                reference_distance_text=edit_ref_distance.text(),
 600                target_units_text=edit_units.text(),
 601            )
 602
 603            if result.target_units != unit_utils.normalize_axis_unit(edit_units.text(), default="nm"):
 604                edit_units.blockSignals(True)
 605                edit_units.setText(result.target_units)
 606                edit_units.blockSignals(False)
 607
 608            if result.error:
 609                set_ref_error(result.error)
 610                return
 611
 612            if result.ppu is None:
 613                set_ref_error(None)
 614                return
 615
 616            ppu = result.ppu
 617            edit_ppu_x.setText(f"{ppu:.12g}")
 618            if chk_lock_ratio.isChecked():
 619                edit_ppu_y.setText(f"{ppu:.12g}")
 620            set_ref_error(None)
 621            logger.debug(
 622                "Calibration reference parsed: units=%s computed_ppu=%s",
 623                result.target_units,
 624                ppu,
 625            )
 626
 627        chk_lock_ratio.toggled.connect(sync_locked_ppu)
 628        edit_ppu_x.textChanged.connect(sync_locked_ppu)
 629        edit_ref_pixels.textChanged.connect(update_ppu_from_reference)
 630        edit_ref_distance.textChanged.connect(update_ppu_from_reference)
 631        edit_units.textChanged.connect(update_ppu_from_reference)
 632        sync_locked_ppu()
 633
 634        layout.addRow(chk_lock_ratio)
 635        layout.addRow("Pixels per unit X:", edit_ppu_x)
 636        layout.addRow("Pixels per unit Y:", edit_ppu_y)
 637        layout.addRow("Units:", edit_units)
 638        layout.addRow("Reference distance (pixels):", edit_ref_pixels)
 639        layout.addRow("Reference distance:", edit_ref_distance)
 640        layout.addRow("", lbl_ref_error)
 641
 642        draw_button = QtWidgets.QPushButton("Draw distance on canvas")
 643        layout.addRow("Reference picker:", draw_button)
 644
 645        draw_result_code = 2
 646        metadata_reloaded_in_dialog = False
 647
 648        def _collect_state() -> Dict[str, Any]:
 649            return {
 650                "ppu_x": edit_ppu_x.text().strip() or f"{default_ppu_x:.12g}",
 651                "ppu_y": edit_ppu_y.text().strip() or f"{default_ppu_y:.12g}",
 652                "units": edit_units.text().strip() or "nm",
 653                "reference_pixels": edit_ref_pixels.text().strip() or "0",
 654                "reference_distance": edit_ref_distance.text().strip() or "1",
 655                "lock_xy": chk_lock_ratio.isChecked(),
 656            }
 657
 658        def _request_draw() -> None:
 659            logger.debug("Calibration dialog draw requested")
 660            self._calibration_dialog_state = _collect_state()
 661            dialog.done(draw_result_code)
 662
 663        draw_button.clicked.connect(_request_draw)
 664
 665        def _reload_from_metadata() -> None:
 666            nonlocal metadata_reloaded_in_dialog
 667            logger.debug("Calibration dialog metadata reload requested")
 668            if not self._reload_calibration_from_file_metadata():
 669                set_ref_error("Could not reload calibration metadata from file.")
 670                QtWidgets.QMessageBox.warning(
 671                    dialog,
 672                    "Calibration",
 673                    "Could not reload calibration metadata from this file.",
 674                )
 675                return
 676
 677            self._manual_calibrated = False
 678            self._calibration_status = "metadata"
 679            self.is_reciprocal_space = self._detect_reciprocal_space(self.signal)
 680            self._refresh_view_after_calibration_change()
 681            metadata_reloaded_in_dialog = True
 682
 683            scale_x = float(self.ax_x.scale)
 684            scale_y = float(self.ax_y.scale)
 685            ppu_x = 1.0 / scale_x if scale_x > 0 else 1.0
 686            ppu_y = 1.0 / scale_y if scale_y > 0 else 1.0
 687            edit_ppu_x.setText(f"{ppu_x:.12g}")
 688            edit_ppu_y.setText(f"{ppu_y:.12g}")
 689            edit_units.setText(unit_utils.normalize_axis_unit(self.ax_x.units, default="nm"))
 690            set_ref_error(None)
 691            logger.debug(
 692                "Calibration dialog populated from reloaded metadata: ppu_x=%s ppu_y=%s units=%s",
 693                ppu_x,
 694                ppu_y,
 695                unit_utils.normalize_axis_unit(self.ax_x.units, default="nm"),
 696            )
 697
 698        buttons = QtWidgets.QDialogButtonBox(
 699            QtWidgets.QDialogButtonBox.Ok | QtWidgets.QDialogButtonBox.Cancel,
 700            parent=dialog,
 701        )
 702        btn_reload_meta = buttons.addButton(
 703            "Reload Metadata Calibration",
 704            QtWidgets.QDialogButtonBox.ActionRole,
 705        )
 706        btn_reload_meta.clicked.connect(_reload_from_metadata)
 707        buttons.accepted.connect(dialog.accept)
 708        buttons.rejected.connect(dialog.reject)
 709        layout.addRow(buttons)
 710
 711        result = dialog.exec_()
 712        if result == draw_result_code:
 713            logger.debug("Calibration dialog closed for distance drawing")
 714            self._start_calibration_distance_pick()
 715            return
 716
 717        if result != QtWidgets.QDialog.Accepted:
 718            logger.debug("Calibration dialog cancelled")
 719            self._calibration_dialog_state = None
 720            return
 721
 722        parsed_manual = calibration_logic.parse_manual_calibration(
 723            ppu_x_text=edit_ppu_x.text(),
 724            ppu_y_text=edit_ppu_y.text(),
 725            units_text=edit_units.text(),
 726            lock_xy=chk_lock_ratio.isChecked(),
 727        )
 728        if parsed_manual.error:
 729            QtWidgets.QMessageBox.warning(
 730                self,
 731                "Parameters",
 732                parsed_manual.error,
 733            )
 734            return
 735
 736        new_ppu_x = float(parsed_manual.ppu_x)
 737        new_ppu_y = float(parsed_manual.ppu_y)
 738        new_units = str(parsed_manual.units)
 739
 740        logger.debug(
 741            "Applying manual calibration from dialog: ppu_x=%s ppu_y=%s units=%s lock_xy=%s",
 742            new_ppu_x,
 743            new_ppu_y,
 744            new_units,
 745            chk_lock_ratio.isChecked(),
 746        )
 747
 748        proposed_scale_x = 1.0 / new_ppu_x
 749        proposed_scale_y = 1.0 / new_ppu_y
 750        current_units = unit_utils.normalize_axis_unit(self.ax_x.units, default="nm")
 751        current_scale_x = float(self.ax_x.scale)
 752        current_scale_y = float(self.ax_y.scale)
 753
 754        if calibration_logic.should_preserve_metadata_status(
 755            metadata_reloaded_in_dialog=metadata_reloaded_in_dialog,
 756            proposed_scale_x=proposed_scale_x,
 757            proposed_scale_y=proposed_scale_y,
 758            current_scale_x=current_scale_x,
 759            current_scale_y=current_scale_y,
 760            new_units=new_units,
 761            current_units=current_units,
 762        ):
 763            logger.debug(
 764                "Calibration dialog accepted after metadata reload with unchanged values; preserving metadata status"
 765            )
 766            self._manual_calibrated = False
 767            self._calibration_status = "metadata"
 768            self.is_reciprocal_space = self._detect_reciprocal_space(self.signal)
 769            self._refresh_view_after_calibration_change()
 770            self._calibration_dialog_state = None
 771            return
 772
 773        self.ax_x.scale = proposed_scale_x
 774        self.ax_y.scale = proposed_scale_y
 775        self.ax_x.units = new_units
 776        self.ax_y.units = new_units
 777        self._manual_calibrated = True
 778        self._calibration_status = "manual"
 779        self._calibration_dialog_state = None
 780        metadata_reciprocal = self._detect_reciprocal_space(self.signal)
 781        self.is_reciprocal_space = bool(metadata_reciprocal or unit_utils.is_reciprocal_unit(new_units))
 782        self._refresh_view_after_calibration_change()
 783        logger.debug("Manual calibration applied successfully")
 784
 785    def _prepare_for_measurement_input(self) -> None:
 786        """Clear transform-ROI selection state before entering any measurement flow."""
 787        had_fft = self.selected_fft_box is not None
 788        had_ifft = self.selected_inverse_fft_box is not None
 789
 790        self.selected_fft_box = None
 791        self.selected_inverse_fft_box = None
 792
 793        if had_fft or had_ifft:
 794            logger.debug(
 795                "Cleared ROI selection before measurement input: fft_selected=%s inverse_fft_selected=%s",
 796                had_fft,
 797                had_ifft,
 798            )
 799
 800    def _start_calibration_distance_pick(self) -> None:
 801        """Start interactive distance picking used by manual calibration."""
 802        if self.line_tool is None:
 803            logger.debug("Calibration distance pick requested but line tool is unavailable")
 804            QtWidgets.QMessageBox.warning(
 805                self,
 806                "Calibration",
 807                "Line drawing tool is not available.",
 808            )
 809            return
 810
 811        logger.debug("Starting calibration distance pick")
 812        self._prepare_for_measurement_input()
 813
 814        if self.btn_measure is not None:
 815            self.btn_measure.blockSignals(True)
 816            self.btn_measure.setChecked(False)
 817            self.btn_measure.blockSignals(False)
 818            self.btn_measure.setStyleSheet("")
 819
 820        self.line_tool.disable()
 821        self._on_measurement_drawing_state_changed(False)
 822
 823        state = dict(self._calibration_dialog_state or {})
 824        self._line_draw_mode = "calibration"
 825
 826        def _on_pixels_selected(pixel_distance: float) -> None:
 827            logger.debug("Calibration distance picked: %.6g px", pixel_distance)
 828            next_state = dict(state)
 829            next_state["reference_pixels"] = f"{pixel_distance:.12g}"
 830            self._calibration_dialog_state = None
 831            QtCore.QTimer.singleShot(0, lambda: self._open_calibration_dialog(next_state))
 832
 833        self._on_calibration_pixels_selected = _on_pixels_selected
 834        self.line_tool.enable()
 835        self._on_measurement_drawing_state_changed(False)
 836
 837    def _set_base_window_title(self, title: str) -> None:
 838        """Set and store the base window title used by stateful title updates.
 839
 840                        Args:
 841                            title: Title text displayed in the associated UI element.
 842                    
 843        """
 844        self._base_window_title = title
 845        self._on_measurement_drawing_state_changed(False)
 846
 847    def _on_measurement_drawing_state_changed(self, is_drawing: bool) -> None:
 848        """Refresh window-title hints when measurement drawing mode changes.
 849
 850                        Args:
 851                            is_drawing: Boolean flag indicating whether drawing.
 852                    
 853        """
 854        title = self._base_window_title or self.windowTitle()
 855        for prefix in ("Measurement mode - ", "<esc> to exit measurement mode - "):
 856            if title.startswith(prefix):
 857                title = title[len(prefix):]
 858
 859        measurement_ready = bool(self.line_tool is not None and getattr(self.line_tool, "is_enabled", False))
 860        if measurement_ready:
 861            title = f"<esc> to exit measurement mode - {title}"
 862
 863        if self.windowTitle() != title:
 864            self.setWindowTitle(title)
 865            logger.debug(
 866                "Window title updated for measurement mode: drawing=%s ready=%s title=%s",
 867                is_drawing,
 868                measurement_ready,
 869                title,
 870            )
 871
 872    def _sync_scale_bar_units_from_axes(self) -> None:
 873        """Sync scale-bar unit text/mode from current axis units."""
 874        if self.scale_bar is None or self.ax_x is None:
 875            return
 876
 877        display_unit, reciprocal_mode = unit_utils.scale_bar_unit_and_mode(
 878            self.ax_x.units,
 879            reciprocal_hint=self.is_reciprocal_space,
 880        )
 881        self.scale_bar.units = display_unit
 882        self.scale_bar.reciprocal = reciprocal_mode
 883        logger.debug(
 884            "Scale bar sync from axes: axis_units=%s display_unit=%s reciprocal=%s",
 885            self.ax_x.units,
 886            display_unit,
 887            reciprocal_mode,
 888        )
 889
 890    def _refresh_view_after_calibration_change(self) -> None:
 891        """Apply updated calibration to image rect, ranges, and scale bar."""
 892        x_offset, y_offset, w, h = self.image_bounds
 893        logger.debug(
 894            "Refreshing view after calibration change: x_offset=%s y_offset=%s w=%s h=%s",
 895            x_offset,
 896            y_offset,
 897            w,
 898            h,
 899        )
 900
 901        if self.img_orig is not None:
 902            self.img_orig.setRect(QtCore.QRectF(x_offset, y_offset, w, h))
 903
 904        if self.p1 is not None:
 905            self.p1.setXRange(x_offset, x_offset + w, padding=0)
 906            self.p1.setYRange(y_offset, y_offset + h, padding=0)
 907
 908        if self.scale_bar is not None:
 909            self._sync_scale_bar_units_from_axes()
 910            if hasattr(self.scale_bar, "_update_geometry"):
 911                self.scale_bar._update_geometry()
 912
 913        self._refresh_scale_bar_calibration_tag()
 914
 915    def _refresh_scale_bar_calibration_tag(self) -> None:
 916        """Update the scale-bar tag indicating current calibration status."""
 917        if self.scale_bar is None or not hasattr(self.scale_bar, "set_status_tag"):
 918            return
 919
 920        if self._calibration_status == "uncalibrated":
 921            self.scale_bar.set_status_tag("UNCALIBRATED")
 922        elif self._calibration_status == "manual":
 923            self.scale_bar.set_status_tag("manually calibrated")
 924        else:
 925            self.scale_bar.set_status_tag(None)
 926        logger.debug("Scale bar calibration tag refreshed: status=%s", self._calibration_status)
 927
 928    def _detect_reciprocal_space(self, signal) -> bool:
 929        """Determine if the signal should be treated as reciprocal space.
 930
 931            Args:
 932                signal: HyperSpy signal containing image data, axes, and metadata.
 933
 934            Returns:
 935                Computed result produced by this operation.
 936        """
 937
 938        # 1) Prefer explicit HyperSpy metadata when available
 939        try:
 940            meta = getattr(signal, "metadata", None)
 941            sig_meta = getattr(meta, "Signal", None)
 942            sig_type = getattr(sig_meta, "signal_type", None)
 943            if isinstance(sig_type, str):
 944                st = sig_type.strip().lower()
 945                if st in {"diffraction", "electron_diffraction", "fft"}:
 946                    return True
 947                if st in {"image", "tem", "stem"}:
 948                    return False
 949        except Exception:
 950            pass
 951
 952        # 2) Inspect axis unit strings for common reciprocal-space patterns
 953        units_parts: list[str] = []
 954        try:
 955            ax0 = signal.axes_manager[0]
 956            ax1 = signal.axes_manager[1]
 957            units_parts.append(str(getattr(ax0, "units", "") or ""))
 958            units_parts.append(str(getattr(ax1, "units", "") or ""))
 959        except Exception:
 960            pass
 961
 962        if any(unit_utils.is_reciprocal_unit(part) for part in units_parts):
 963            return True
 964
 965        # 3) Default: treat as real-space image. We no longer rely on
 966        # intensity-based heuristics for diffraction detection because
 967        # they can classify visually similar images from the same file
 968        # differently, leading to inconsistent scale-bar behaviour.
 969        return False
 970
 971    @property
 972    def image_bounds(self) -> Tuple[float, float, float, float]:
 973        """Get the pixel bounds of the displayed image.
 974        
 975        Returns:
 976            (x_min, x_max, y_min, y_max) in image pixel coordinates.
 977        """
 978        x_offset = self.ax_x.offset if self.ax_x else 0
 979        y_offset = self.ax_y.offset if self.ax_y else 0
 980        w = self.ax_x.size * self.ax_x.scale if self.ax_x else 1
 981        h = self.ax_y.size * self.ax_y.scale if self.ax_y else 1
 982        return x_offset, y_offset, w, h
 983
 984    def _init_display_window(self):
 985        """Initialize display min/max/gamma from current source data."""
 986        source_data = self.data
 987        if self.view_mode == "fft":
 988            source_data = self._magnitude_spectrum
 989        elif self.view_mode == "inverse_fft":
 990            source_data = self._inverse_fft_image
 991
 992        if source_data is None:
 993            self.display_min = 0.0
 994            self.display_max = 1.0
 995            self.display_gamma = 1.0
 996            return
 997
 998        arr = np.asarray(source_data, dtype=float)
 999        finite = arr[np.isfinite(arr)]
1000        if finite.size == 0:
1001            self.display_min = 0.0
1002            self.display_max = 1.0
1003        else:
1004            self.display_min = float(finite.min())
1005            self.display_max = float(finite.max())
1006        self.display_gamma = 1.0
1007        logger.debug(
1008            "Initialized display window: min=%s max=%s gamma=%s",
1009            self.display_min,
1010            self.display_max,
1011            self.display_gamma,
1012        )
1013
1014    def setup_ui(self):
1015        """Set up the main UI layout with plot, controls, and toolbars."""
1016        central = QtWidgets.QWidget()
1017        self.setCentralWidget(central)
1018        main_layout = QtWidgets.QVBoxLayout(central)
1019        main_layout.setContentsMargins(0, 0, 0, 0)
1020        self._setup_menu_bar()
1021
1022        self.glw = pg.GraphicsLayoutWidget()
1023        logger.debug(
1024            "setup_ui: mode=%s useOpenGL=%s QT_QPA_PLATFORM=%r QT_OPENGL=%r",
1025            self.view_mode,
1026            pg.getConfigOption("useOpenGL"),
1027            os.environ.get("QT_QPA_PLATFORM"),
1028            os.environ.get("QT_OPENGL"),
1029        )
1030        self.glw.ci.setContentsMargins(0, 0, 0, 0)
1031        if hasattr(self.glw.ci, "layout"):
1032            self.glw.ci.layout.setContentsMargins(0, 0, 0, 0)
1033            self.glw.ci.layout.setSpacing(0)
1034        main_layout.addWidget(self.glw)
1035
1036        # Hidden command line at the bottom, shown when ':' is pressed
1037        self.command_edit = QtWidgets.QLineEdit()
1038        self.command_edit.setPlaceholderText(
1039            "Vim command (:F, :d, :e <file>, :E, :a)"
1040        )
1041        self.command_edit.returnPressed.connect(self._execute_command_from_line)
1042        self.command_edit.hide()
1043        main_layout.addWidget(self.command_edit)
1044
1045        # Shortcut for ':' so command mode is easy to enter while this
1046        # image window is active.
1047        colon_shortcut = QtGui.QShortcut(QtGui.QKeySequence(":"), self)
1048        colon_shortcut.activated.connect(self._enter_command_mode)
1049
1050        self.btn_measure = QtWidgets.QPushButton("Measure Distance")
1051        self.btn_measure.setCheckable(True)
1052        self.btn_measure.clicked.connect(self.measurements.toggle_line_measurement)
1053        self.btn_measure.hide()
1054
1055        self.p1 = self.glw.addPlot()
1056        self.p1.hideAxis("bottom")
1057        self.p1.hideAxis("left")
1058        self.p1.showAxis("top", False)
1059        self.p1.showAxis("right", False)
1060        self.p1.hideButtons()
1061        self.p1.setMenuEnabled(False)
1062
1063        self.p1.vb.setAspectLocked(True, ratio=1.0)
1064        if hasattr(self.p1.vb, "setBorder"):
1065            self.p1.vb.setBorder(None)
1066
1067        self.img_orig = pg.ImageItem(axisOrder="row-major")
1068        self.p1.addItem(self.img_orig)
1069        self._apply_render_preferences_to_view()
1070        self.p1.invertY(True)
1071        if self.view_mode == "fft":
1072            cmap = pg.colormap.get("magma")
1073            self.img_orig.setLookupTable(cmap.getLookupTable())
1074            self._update_image_display()
1075            if self._nyq_x is not None and self._nyq_y is not None:
1076                self.img_orig.setRect(
1077                    QtCore.QRectF(-self._nyq_x, -self._nyq_y, 2 * self._nyq_x, 2 * self._nyq_y)
1078                )
1079            if hasattr(self.p1.vb, "setPadding"):
1080                self.p1.vb.setPadding(0.0)
1081            fft_unit, fft_reciprocal = unit_utils.scale_bar_unit_and_mode(
1082                self.freq_axis_base_unit,
1083                reciprocal_hint=True,
1084            )
1085            self.scale_bar = DynamicScaleBar(self.p1.vb, units=fft_unit)
1086            self.scale_bar.reciprocal = fft_reciprocal
1087        elif self.view_mode == "inverse_fft":
1088            self.img_orig.setLookupTable(None)
1089            self._update_image_display()
1090            x_offset, y_offset, w, h = self.image_bounds
1091            self.img_orig.setRect(QtCore.QRectF(x_offset, y_offset, w, h))
1092
1093            if hasattr(self.p1.vb, "setPadding"):
1094                self.p1.vb.setPadding(0.0)
1095            self.p1.setXRange(x_offset, x_offset + w, padding=0)
1096            self.p1.setYRange(y_offset, y_offset + h, padding=0)
1097
1098            axis_units = self.ax_x.units if self.ax_x is not None else "nm"
1099            display_unit, reciprocal_mode = unit_utils.scale_bar_unit_and_mode(
1100                axis_units,
1101                reciprocal_hint=False,
1102            )
1103            self.scale_bar = DynamicScaleBar(self.p1.vb, units=display_unit)
1104            self.scale_bar.reciprocal = reciprocal_mode
1105        else:
1106            self._apply_colormap()
1107            self._update_image_display()
1108
1109            x_offset, y_offset, w, h = self.image_bounds
1110            self.img_orig.setRect(QtCore.QRectF(x_offset, y_offset, w, h))
1111
1112            if hasattr(self.p1.vb, "setPadding"):
1113                self.p1.vb.setPadding(0.0)
1114            self.p1.setXRange(x_offset, x_offset + w, padding=0)
1115            self.p1.setYRange(y_offset, y_offset + h, padding=0)
1116
1117            axis_units = self.ax_x.units if self.ax_x is not None else "nm"
1118            display_unit, reciprocal_mode = unit_utils.scale_bar_unit_and_mode(
1119                axis_units,
1120                reciprocal_hint=self.is_reciprocal_space,
1121            )
1122            self.scale_bar = DynamicScaleBar(self.p1.vb, units=display_unit)
1123            self.scale_bar.reciprocal = reciprocal_mode
1124            if not reciprocal_mode:
1125                try:
1126                    overlay_label = self._build_export_overlay_label()
1127                    if overlay_label and hasattr(self.scale_bar, "set_extra_label"):
1128                        self.scale_bar.set_extra_label(overlay_label)
1129                except Exception:
1130                    pass
1131
1132            self._refresh_scale_bar_calibration_tag()
1133
1134        self.line_tool = LineDrawingTool(
1135            self.p1,
1136            self.measurements.on_line_drawn,
1137            self._on_measurement_drawing_state_changed,
1138        )
1139
1140        if hasattr(self.p1, "vb") and hasattr(self.p1.vb, "sigRangeChanged"):
1141            self.p1.vb.sigRangeChanged.connect(self._on_view_range_changed)
1142
1143        self.setup_keyboard_shortcuts()
1144
1145    def _render_quality_mode(self) -> str:
1146        """Return configured image-resampling quality mode.
1147
1148            Returns:
1149                Normalized render quality mode key used by the viewer pipeline.
1150        """
1151        return str(self._render_settings.get("image_resampling_quality", RESAMPLING_HIGH)).strip().lower()
1152
1153    def _apply_render_preferences_to_view(self) -> None:
1154        """Apply rendering preference flags to the image view backend."""
1155        if self.img_orig is None or self.glw is None:
1156            return
1157
1158        quality = self._render_quality_mode()
1159        auto_downsample = quality in {RESAMPLING_BALANCED, RESAMPLING_HIGH}
1160        smooth = quality in {RESAMPLING_BALANCED, RESAMPLING_HIGH}
1161
1162        if hasattr(self.img_orig, "setAutoDownsample"):
1163            self.img_orig.setAutoDownsample(auto_downsample)
1164
1165        if hasattr(self.glw, "setRenderHint"):
1166            self.glw.setRenderHint(QtGui.QPainter.SmoothPixmapTransform, smooth)
1167
1168        logger.debug(
1169            "Applied render preferences: mode=%s quality=%s auto_downsample=%s smooth_transform=%s useOpenGL=%s",
1170            self.view_mode,
1171            quality,
1172            auto_downsample,
1173            smooth,
1174            pg.getConfigOption("useOpenGL"),
1175        )
1176
1177    @staticmethod
1178    def _downsample_by_2_mean(image: np.ndarray) -> Optional[np.ndarray]:
1179        """Downsample a 2D image by 2x2 mean pooling.
1180
1181            Args:
1182                image: 2D image array used for display, FFT, or tone processing.
1183
1184            Returns:
1185                Half-resolution image created by 2x2 mean pooling, or None for unsupported inputs.
1186        """
1187        if image.ndim != 2:
1188            return None
1189
1190        src = np.asarray(image, dtype=np.float32)
1191        h, w = src.shape
1192        h2 = (h // 2) * 2
1193        w2 = (w // 2) * 2
1194        if h2 < 2 or w2 < 2:
1195            return None
1196
1197        view = src[:h2, :w2]
1198        return view.reshape(h2 // 2, 2, w2 // 2, 2).mean(axis=(1, 3), dtype=np.float32)
1199
1200    def _build_mipmap_levels(self, image: np.ndarray) -> None:
1201        """Build a pyramid of downsampled levels for high-quality zooming.
1202
1203                        Args:
1204                            image: Input image array used by the computation.
1205                    
1206        """
1207        self._mipmap_levels = []
1208        base = np.asarray(image, dtype=np.float32)
1209        self._mipmap_levels.append(base)
1210
1211        while len(self._mipmap_levels) < 9:
1212            nxt = self._downsample_by_2_mean(self._mipmap_levels[-1])
1213            if nxt is None:
1214                break
1215            self._mipmap_levels.append(nxt)
1216
1217        self._current_mipmap_level = -1
1218
1219    def _compute_target_mipmap_level(self) -> int:
1220        """Select mipmap level that best matches current visible resolution.
1221
1222            Returns:
1223                Best mipmap pyramid level for the current zoom and viewport.
1224        """
1225        if not self._mipmap_levels or self.p1 is None or self.img_orig is None:
1226            return 0
1227
1228        try:
1229            rect = self.img_orig.rect()
1230            rect_w = float(rect.width())
1231            rect_h = float(rect.height())
1232            if rect_w <= 0 or rect_h <= 0:
1233                return 0
1234
1235            vr = self.p1.vb.viewRange()
1236            x0, x1 = float(vr[0][0]), float(vr[0][1])
1237            y0, y1 = float(vr[1][0]), float(vr[1][1])
1238
1239            visible_cols = abs((x1 - x0) / rect_w) * float(self._mipmap_levels[0].shape[1])
1240            visible_rows = abs((y1 - y0) / rect_h) * float(self._mipmap_levels[0].shape[0])
1241
1242            view_px_w = max(float(self.p1.vb.width()), 1.0)
1243            view_px_h = max(float(self.p1.vb.height()), 1.0)
1244
1245            src_per_screen = max(visible_cols / view_px_w, visible_rows / view_px_h, 1.0)
1246            level = int(np.floor(np.log2(src_per_screen)))
1247        except Exception:
1248            return 0
1249
1250        return max(0, min(level, len(self._mipmap_levels) - 1))
1251
1252    def _set_display_image(self, image: np.ndarray) -> None:
1253        """Push image data into the display item with current quality mode.
1254
1255                        Args:
1256                            image: Input image array used by the computation.
1257                    
1258        """
1259        if self.img_orig is None:
1260            return
1261
1262        self._display_image_full_res = np.asarray(image, dtype=np.float32)
1263        quality = self._render_quality_mode()
1264
1265        if quality == RESAMPLING_HIGH:
1266            self._build_mipmap_levels(self._display_image_full_res)
1267            self._on_view_range_changed(force=True)
1268            return
1269
1270        self._mipmap_levels = []
1271        self._current_mipmap_level = -1
1272        self.img_orig.setImage(self._display_image_full_res, autoLevels=False, levels=(0.0, 1.0))
1273
1274    def _on_view_range_changed(self, *_args, force: bool = False) -> None:
1275        """Update displayed mipmap image after pan/zoom range changes.
1276
1277            Args:
1278                *_args: Additional callback arguments from Qt signal emissions.
1279                force: When True, refreshes display state even if cached values match.
1280        """
1281        if self.img_orig is None:
1282            return
1283        if self._render_quality_mode() != RESAMPLING_HIGH:
1284            return
1285        if not self._mipmap_levels:
1286            return
1287
1288        level = self._compute_target_mipmap_level()
1289        if not force and level == self._current_mipmap_level:
1290            return
1291
1292        self._current_mipmap_level = level
1293        self.img_orig.setImage(self._mipmap_levels[level], autoLevels=False, levels=(0.0, 1.0))
1294
1295    def _update_image_display(self):
1296        """Render source data into the image item using tone and colormap settings."""
1297        if self.data is None or self.img_orig is None:
1298            if self.view_mode not in {"fft", "inverse_fft"}:
1299                return
1300
1301        if self.display_min is None or self.display_max is None:
1302            self._init_display_window()
1303
1304        if self.view_mode == "fft":
1305            if self._magnitude_spectrum is None:
1306                return
1307
1308            display_data = self._magnitude_spectrum
1309
1310            adjusted = utils.apply_intensity_transform(
1311                display_data,
1312                self.display_min,
1313                self.display_max,
1314                self.display_gamma,
1315            )
1316            if adjusted is None:
1317                return
1318
1319            self._set_display_image(adjusted)
1320            if self._nyq_x is not None and self._nyq_y is not None:
1321                self.img_orig.setRect(
1322                    QtCore.QRectF(-self._nyq_x, -self._nyq_y, 2 * self._nyq_x, 2 * self._nyq_y)
1323                )
1324            return
1325
1326        if self.view_mode == "inverse_fft":
1327            if self._inverse_fft_image is None:
1328                return
1329
1330            adjusted = utils.apply_intensity_transform(
1331                self._inverse_fft_image,
1332                self.display_min,
1333                self.display_max,
1334                self.display_gamma,
1335            )
1336            if adjusted is None:
1337                return
1338
1339            self._set_display_image(adjusted)
1340            return
1341
1342        display_data = self.data
1343
1344        adjusted = utils.apply_intensity_transform(
1345            display_data,
1346            self.display_min,
1347            self.display_max,
1348            self.display_gamma,
1349        )
1350        if adjusted is None:
1351            return
1352
1353        self._set_display_image(adjusted)
1354
1355    def _apply_colormap(self) -> None:
1356        """Apply the currently selected colormap to the main image."""
1357
1358        if self.img_orig is None:
1359            return
1360
1361        if not self._available_colormaps:
1362            return
1363
1364        name = self._available_colormaps[self._current_colormap_index % len(self._available_colormaps)]
1365
1366        # "gray" means the default grayscale appearance (no custom LUT)
1367        if name == "gray":
1368            try:
1369                self.img_orig.setLookupTable(None)
1370            except Exception:
1371                pass
1372            return
1373
1374        try:
1375            cmap = pg.colormap.get(name)
1376            self.img_orig.setLookupTable(cmap.getLookupTable())
1377        except Exception:
1378            # Fall back to default grayscale if something goes wrong
1379            try:
1380                self.img_orig.setLookupTable(None)
1381            except Exception:
1382                pass
1383
1384    def setup_keyboard_shortcuts(self):
1385        """Configure keyboard shortcuts for common image operations.
1386        
1387        Sets up Delete key for removing FFT regions and other navigation shortcuts.
1388        """
1389        delete_shortcut = QtGui.QShortcut(QtGui.QKeySequence.Delete, self)
1390        delete_shortcut.activated.connect(self.fft_manager.delete_selected_roi)
1391
1392        backspace_shortcut = QtGui.QShortcut(
1393            QtGui.QKeySequence(QtCore.Qt.Key_Backspace), self
1394        )
1395        backspace_shortcut.activated.connect(self.fft_manager.delete_selected_roi)
1396
1397        escape_shortcut = QtGui.QShortcut(QtGui.QKeySequence(QtCore.Qt.Key_Escape), self)
1398        escape_shortcut.activated.connect(self.measurements.exit_measure_mode)
1399
1400    def _set_colormap_by_name(self, name: str) -> None:
1401        """Set the active colormap by name and update the button label.
1402
1403                        Args:
1404                            name: Name identifier used to locate or label an entity.
1405                    
1406        """
1407
1408        if not self._available_colormaps:
1409            return
1410
1411        try:
1412            index = self._available_colormaps.index(name)
1413        except ValueError:
1414            return
1415
1416        self._current_colormap_index = index
1417
1418        if self.btn_colormap is not None:
1419            self.btn_colormap.setText(f"Colormap: {name}")
1420
1421        self._apply_colormap()
1422
1423    def _cycle_colormap_forward(self) -> None:
1424        """Cycle to the next colormap in the list.
1425        
1426        Triggered by the + key. Keyboard shortcut for quick colormap navigation.
1427        """
1428        if not self._available_colormaps:
1429            return
1430        
1431        self._current_colormap_index = (self._current_colormap_index + 1) % len(self._available_colormaps)
1432        current_cmap = self._available_colormaps[self._current_colormap_index]
1433        
1434        if self.btn_colormap is not None:
1435            self.btn_colormap.setText(f"Colormap: {current_cmap}")
1436        
1437        self._apply_colormap()
1438        logger.debug(f"Colormap cycled forward to: {current_cmap}")
1439
1440    def _cycle_colormap_backward(self) -> None:
1441        """Cycle to the previous colormap in the list.
1442        
1443        Triggered by the - key. Keyboard shortcut for quick colormap navigation.
1444        """
1445        if not self._available_colormaps:
1446            return
1447        
1448        self._current_colormap_index = (self._current_colormap_index - 1) % len(self._available_colormaps)
1449        current_cmap = self._available_colormaps[self._current_colormap_index]
1450        
1451        if self.btn_colormap is not None:
1452            self.btn_colormap.setText(f"Colormap: {current_cmap}")
1453        
1454        self._apply_colormap()
1455        logger.debug(f"Colormap cycled backward to: {current_cmap}")
1456
1457    def _refresh_transform_data(self):
1458        """Refresh cached FFT/inverse-FFT data from the current source region."""
1459        logger.debug(
1460            "Refreshing transform data: mode=%s source_shape=%s last_region_id=%s",
1461            self.view_mode,
1462            getattr(self._source_region, "shape", None),
1463            self._last_region_id,
1464        )
1465        if self.view_mode == "fft":
1466            self._compute_fft()
1467        elif self.view_mode == "inverse_fft":
1468            self._compute_inverse_fft_from_region()
1469
1470    def _compute_fft(self):
1471        """Compute and cache FFT magnitude/complex arrays for the source ROI."""
1472        if self._source_region is None or self.ax_x is None or self.ax_y is None:
1473            logger.debug("Skipping FFT compute: missing source region or axes")
1474            return
1475
1476        current_region_id = id(self._source_region)
1477        if self._last_region_id == current_region_id and self._magnitude_spectrum is not None:
1478            logger.debug("Skipping FFT compute: region id unchanged (%s)", current_region_id)
1479            return
1480
1481        self._last_region_id = current_region_id
1482
1483        self._magnitude_spectrum, self._nyq_x, self._nyq_y = utils.compute_fft(
1484            self._source_region,
1485            self.ax_x.scale,
1486            self.ax_y.scale,
1487        )
1488        logger.debug(
1489            "Computed FFT: shape=%s nyq_x=%s nyq_y=%s min=%s max=%s",
1490            getattr(self._magnitude_spectrum, "shape", None),
1491            self._nyq_x,
1492            self._nyq_y,
1493            float(np.nanmin(self._magnitude_spectrum)) if self._magnitude_spectrum is not None else None,
1494            float(np.nanmax(self._magnitude_spectrum)) if self._magnitude_spectrum is not None else None,
1495        )
1496
1497        window = np.hanning(self._source_region.shape[0])[:, None] * np.hanning(
1498            self._source_region.shape[1]
1499        )[None, :]
1500        windowed = self._source_region * window
1501        self._fft_complex = np.fft.fftshift(np.fft.fft2(windowed))
1502        self._inverse_fft_cache = None
1503
1504    def _compute_inverse_fft_from_region(self):
1505        """Compute inverse FFT image from the current source-region data."""
1506        if self._source_region is None or self.ax_x is None or self.ax_y is None:
1507            logger.debug("Skipping inverse FFT compute: missing source region or axes")
1508            return
1509
1510        current_region_id = id(self._source_region)
1511        if self._last_region_id == current_region_id and self._inverse_fft_image is not None:
1512            logger.debug("Skipping inverse FFT compute: region id unchanged (%s)", current_region_id)
1513            return
1514
1515        self._last_region_id = current_region_id
1516
1517        source_region = np.asarray(self._source_region, dtype=np.float32)
1518        if source_region.ndim != 2:
1519            logger.debug("Skipping inverse FFT compute: source region is not 2D (ndim=%s)", source_region.ndim)
1520            return
1521
1522        self._inverse_fft_image = np.abs(np.fft.fftshift(np.fft.ifft2(np.fft.ifftshift(source_region))))
1523        logger.debug(
1524            "Computed inverse FFT: input_shape=%s output_shape=%s output_min=%s output_max=%s",
1525            source_region.shape,
1526            getattr(self._inverse_fft_image, "shape", None),
1527            float(np.nanmin(self._inverse_fft_image)) if self._inverse_fft_image is not None else None,
1528            float(np.nanmax(self._inverse_fft_image)) if self._inverse_fft_image is not None else None,
1529        )
1530
1531    # Vim-style command handling -------------------------------------
1532
1533    def eventFilter(self, obj, event):  # type: ignore[override]
1534        """Capture ':' globally when this window is active.
1535
1536            Args:
1537                obj: QObject currently being filtered by the event filter.
1538                event: Qt drag/drop or input event provided by the GUI framework.
1539        """
1540        if self._command_mode.handle_key_event(self.isActiveWindow(), event):
1541            return True
1542
1543        return super().eventFilter(obj, event)
1544
1545    def _enter_command_mode(self) -> None:
1546        """Move focus into command-line mode for vim-style commands."""
1547        self._command_mode.enter_mode()
1548
1549    def _exit_command_mode(self) -> None:
1550        """Exit command mode and restore focus to the graphics widget."""
1551        self._command_mode.exit_mode()
1552
1553    def _execute_command_from_line(self) -> None:
1554        """Parse and execute the current command-line text input."""
1555        self._command_mode.execute_from_line()
1556
1557    def _open_adjust_dialog(self):
1558        """Open or focus the tone-curve adjustment dialog for current view data."""
1559        if self.view_mode == "fft" and self._magnitude_spectrum is None:
1560            return
1561
1562        if self.view_mode == "inverse_fft" and self._inverse_fft_image is None:
1563            return
1564
1565        if self.view_mode == "image" and self.data is None:
1566            return
1567
1568        if self._tone_dialog is not None and self._tone_dialog.isVisible():
1569            self._tone_dialog.raise_()
1570            self._tone_dialog.activateWindow()
1571            return
1572
1573        initial_min = self.display_min
1574        initial_max = self.display_max
1575        initial_gamma = self.display_gamma
1576
1577        def on_params_changed(min_val: float, max_val: float, gamma: float):
1578            self.display_min = float(min_val)
1579            self.display_max = float(max_val)
1580            self.display_gamma = float(gamma)
1581            self._update_image_display()
1582
1583        if self.view_mode == "fft":
1584            source_data = self._magnitude_spectrum
1585        elif self.view_mode == "inverse_fft":
