1586            source_data = self._inverse_fft_image
1587        else:
1588            source_data = self.data
1589
1590        dialog = ToneCurveDialog(
1591            source_data,
1592            initial_min=initial_min,
1593            initial_max=initial_max,
1594            initial_gamma=initial_gamma,
1595            parent=self,
1596            on_params_changed=on_params_changed,
1597        )
1598        self._tone_dialog = dialog
1599
1600        orig_min, orig_max, orig_gamma = (
1601            self.display_min,
1602            self.display_max,
1603            self.display_gamma,
1604        )
1605
1606        def handle_rejected():
1607            self.display_min, self.display_max, self.display_gamma = (
1608                orig_min,
1609                orig_max,
1610                orig_gamma,
1611            )
1612            self._update_image_display()
1613
1614        def handle_finished(_result):
1615            self._tone_dialog = None
1616
1617        dialog.rejected.connect(handle_rejected)
1618        dialog.finished.connect(handle_finished)
1619
1620        dialog.setModal(False)
1621        dialog.show()
1622        dialog.raise_()
1623        dialog.activateWindow()
1624
1625    def _setup_menu_bar(self) -> None:
1626        """Create and wire the menu bar for image-viewer actions."""
1627        config = build_menu_config_for_role(
1628            role="viewer",
1629            callbacks_map={
1630            "Open": self._open_file_dialog,
1631            "Save View": self._save_view_and_ffts,
1632            "Build Figure": lambda: self._show_not_implemented("Build Figure"),
1633            "Calibrate": self._open_calibration_dialog,
1634            "Parameters": self._open_parameters_dialog,
1635            "FFT": lambda _checked=False: self.fft_manager.add_new_fft(),
1636            "Inverse FFT": lambda _checked=False: self.fft_manager.add_new_inverse_fft(),
1637            "Adjust": self._open_adjust_dialog,
1638            "Distance": self._menu_start_distance_measurement,
1639            "History": self.measurements.show_measurement_history,
1640            "Intensity": lambda: self._show_not_implemented("Intensity"),
1641            "Profile": self._menu_start_profile_measurement,
1642            "Metadata": self._show_metadata_window,
1643            "Render Diagnostics": self._show_render_diagnostics,
1644            "Cycle Colormap Forward": self._cycle_colormap_forward,
1645            "Cycle Colormap Backward": self._cycle_colormap_backward,
1646            "Keyboard Shortcuts": self.help_actions.show_keyboard_shortcuts,
1647            "About": self.help_actions.show_about,
1648            "README": self.help_actions.show_readme,
1649            },
1650        )
1651        
1652        # Determine if an image is available for this viewer
1653        if self.view_mode == "image":
1654            image_available = self.data is not None
1655        elif self.view_mode == "fft":
1656            image_available = self._magnitude_spectrum is not None
1657        elif self.view_mode == "inverse_fft":
1658            image_available = self._inverse_fft_image is not None
1659        else:
1660            image_available = False
1661        
1662        # Build menus using the builder
1663        self.menu_builder = MenuBuilder(self, logger)
1664        self.menu_builder.build_from_config(config, image_available=image_available)
1665        
1666        # Add Colormap submenu with individual colormap options to the Display menu
1667        if "Display" in self.menu_builder.menus:
1668            display_menu = self.menu_builder.menus["Display"]
1669            colormap_submenu = display_menu.addMenu("Colormap")
1670            for cmap_name in self._available_colormaps:
1671                action = colormap_submenu.addAction(cmap_name.capitalize())
1672                action.triggered.connect(
1673                    lambda checked=False, name=cmap_name: self._set_colormap_by_name(name)
1674                )
1675                logger.debug(f"Added colormap menu item: {cmap_name}")
1676        
1677        logger.debug("Image viewer menu bar setup complete with keyboard shortcuts and colormap menu")
1678
1679
1680    def _show_not_implemented(self, feature_name: str) -> None:
1681        """Show a generic placeholder message for unfinished features.
1682
1683            Args:
1684                feature_name: Feature label shown in the not-implemented dialog.
1685        """
1686        QtWidgets.QMessageBox.information(
1687            self,
1688            feature_name,
1689            f"{feature_name} is planned but not implemented yet.",
1690        )
1691
1692    def _show_render_diagnostics(self) -> None:
1693        """Display current rendering backend and quality diagnostics."""
1694        gl_available = hardware_acceleration_available(force_refresh=True)
1695        effective = global_render_config_options(self._render_settings, hardware_available=gl_available)
1696
1697        diagnostics: list[str] = [
1698            f"Window mode: {self.view_mode}",
1699            f"File: {self.file_path}",
1700            f"Requested hardware acceleration: {bool(self._render_settings.get('use_hardware_acceleration', True))}",
1701            f"Detected OpenGL available: {gl_available}",
1702            f"Effective pyqtgraph useOpenGL (settings): {effective.get('useOpenGL')}",
1703            f"Current pyqtgraph useOpenGL (global): {pg.getConfigOption('useOpenGL')}",
1704            f"Image resampling quality: {self._render_settings.get('image_resampling_quality')}",
1705            f"QT_QPA_PLATFORM: {os.environ.get('QT_QPA_PLATFORM')}",
1706            f"QT_OPENGL: {os.environ.get('QT_OPENGL')}",
1707            f"QT_XCB_GL_INTEGRATION: {os.environ.get('QT_XCB_GL_INTEGRATION')}",
1708            f"XDG_SESSION_TYPE: {os.environ.get('XDG_SESSION_TYPE')}",
1709            f"WAYLAND_DISPLAY: {os.environ.get('WAYLAND_DISPLAY')}",
1710            f"DISPLAY: {os.environ.get('DISPLAY')}",
1711            f"Graphics widget class: {type(self.glw).__name__ if self.glw is not None else 'None'}",
1712            f"Image item class: {type(self.img_orig).__name__ if self.img_orig is not None else 'None'}",
1713        ]
1714
1715        if self._display_image_full_res is not None:
1716            diagnostics.append(f"Display image shape: {self._display_image_full_res.shape}")
1717            diagnostics.append(f"Display image dtype: {self._display_image_full_res.dtype}")
1718
1719        if self._source_region is not None:
1720            diagnostics.append(f"Source region shape: {self._source_region.shape}")
1721            diagnostics.append(f"Source region dtype: {self._source_region.dtype}")
1722
1723        if self._magnitude_spectrum is not None:
1724            diagnostics.append(f"FFT magnitude shape: {self._magnitude_spectrum.shape}")
1725
1726        if self._inverse_fft_image is not None:
1727            diagnostics.append(f"iFFT image shape: {self._inverse_fft_image.shape}")
1728
1729        details = "\n".join(diagnostics)
1730        logger.debug("Render diagnostics requested:\n%s", details)
1731
1732        # Create a non-modal, resizable dialog
1733        dialog = QtWidgets.QDialog(self, QtCore.Qt.Window)
1734        dialog.setWindowTitle("Render Diagnostics")
1735        dialog.setWindowModality(QtCore.Qt.NonModal)
1736        dialog.setAttribute(QtCore.Qt.WA_DeleteOnClose)
1737        dialog.resize(600, 400)
1738
1739        layout = QtWidgets.QVBoxLayout()
1740
1741        lab_title = QtWidgets.QLabel("Render diagnostics for current window")
1742        layout.addWidget(lab_title)
1743
1744        text_edit = QtWidgets.QTextEdit()
1745        text_edit.setReadOnly(True)
1746        text_edit.setPlainText(details)
1747        text_edit.setFontFamily("Courier")
1748        layout.addWidget(text_edit)
1749
1750        btn_close = QtWidgets.QPushButton("Close")
1751        btn_close.clicked.connect(dialog.close)
1752        layout.addWidget(btn_close)
1753
1754        dialog.setLayout(layout)
1755        dialog.show()
1756
1757    def _open_parameters_dialog(self) -> None:
1758        """Open render-parameter dialog and apply accepted settings."""
1759        current = load_render_settings()
1760        updated = open_parameters_dialog(self, current)
1761        if updated is None:
1762            return
1763
1764        save_render_settings(updated)
1765        self._render_settings = updated
1766        gl_available = hardware_acceleration_available()
1767        pg.setConfigOptions(
1768            **global_render_config_options(updated, hardware_available=gl_available)
1769        )
1770        self._apply_render_preferences_to_view()
1771        self._update_image_display()
1772
1773    def _open_file_dialog(self) -> None:
1774        """Open file picker and load selected image into a new viewer window."""
1775        start_dir = str(Path(self.file_path).parent) if self.file_path else str(Path.cwd())
1776        selected_file = open_file_dialog(self, start_dir)
1777        if selected_file:
1778            open_image_file(selected_file)
1779
1780    def _menu_start_distance_measurement(self) -> None:
1781        """Handle menu action that starts distance measurement mode."""
1782        logger.debug("Menu action: start distance measurement")
1783        self.measurements.start_distance_measurement()
1784
1785    def _menu_start_profile_measurement(self) -> None:
1786        """Handle menu action that starts profile measurement mode."""
1787        logger.debug("Menu action: start profile measurement")
1788        self.measurements.start_profile_measurement()
1789    
1790
1791    def _iter_transform_windows_recursive(self):
1792        """Yield all descendant FFT/iFFT windows for this image file."""
1793        visited: set[int] = set()
1794        stack: list["ImageViewerWindow"] = []
1795        stack.extend(self.fft_windows or [])
1796        stack.extend(self.inverse_fft_windows or [])
1797
1798        while stack:
1799            win = stack.pop()
1800            if win is None:
1801                continue
1802
1803            win_id = id(win)
1804            if win_id in visited:
1805                continue
1806            visited.add(win_id)
1807
1808            try:
1809                mode = getattr(win, "view_mode", None)
1810                same_file = getattr(win, "file_path", None) == self.file_path
1811                if same_file and mode in {"fft", "inverse_fft"}:
1812                    yield win
1813
1814                stack.extend(getattr(win, "fft_windows", []) or [])
1815                stack.extend(getattr(win, "inverse_fft_windows", []) or [])
1816            except RuntimeError:
1817                # Qt object may already be deleted
1818                continue
1819
1820    
1821    def _child_transform_segment(self, parent: "ImageViewerWindow", child: "ImageViewerWindow") -> str:
1822        """Return child segment label relative to parent, e.g. FFT0 or iFFT0.
1823
1824            Args:
1825                parent: Optional parent widget that owns the dialog window.
1826                child: Child transform window being evaluated in the export tree.
1827
1828            Returns:
1829                Human-readable segment describing how a child transform derives from its parent.
1830        """
1831        try:
1832            for i, w in enumerate(parent.fft_windows or []):
1833                if w is child:
1834                    return f"FFT{i}"
1835            for i, w in enumerate(parent.inverse_fft_windows or []):
1836                if w is child:
1837                    return f"iFFT{i}"
1838        except RuntimeError:
1839            pass
1840
1841        # Fallback if linkage lists are stale
1842        mode = getattr(child, "view_mode", "")
1843        return "iFFT0" if mode == "inverse_fft" else "FFT0"
1844
1845    def _transform_chain_label(self, window: "ImageViewerWindow") -> str:
1846        """Build chain label from this root window to target transform window.
1847
1848            Args:
1849                window: Transform window for which a chain label is being generated.
1850
1851            Returns:
1852                Full transform lineage label used in exported overlays and diagnostics.
1853        """
1854        parts: list[str] = []
1855        cur = window
1856        visited: set[int] = set()
1857
1858        while cur is not None and cur is not self:
1859            cur_id = id(cur)
1860            if cur_id in visited:
1861                break
1862            visited.add(cur_id)
1863
1864            parent = getattr(cur, "parent_image_window", None)
1865            if parent is None:
1866                break
1867
1868            parts.append(self._child_transform_segment(parent, cur))
1869            cur = parent
1870
1871        parts.reverse()
1872        return "-".join(parts) if parts else "oops"
1873
1874    def _save_view_and_ffts(self) -> None:
1875        """Save the current view (with annotations) and any FFT windows and their children, recursively.
1876
1877        The main image view is saved in a user-selected format (PNG, TIFF,
1878        or JPEG). All FFT views are saved as PNG files.
1879        """
1880
1881        if self.data is None or self.glw is None:
1882            QtWidgets.QMessageBox.information(
1883                self,
1884                "Save Images",
1885                "No image is currently loaded to save.",
1886            )
1887            return
1888        logger.debug("Saving view/FFTs for file: %s", self.file_path)
1889
1890        # Choose output directory
1891        try:
1892            default_dir = str(Path(self.file_path).parent)
1893        except Exception:
1894            default_dir = str(Path.cwd())
1895
1896        directory = QtWidgets.QFileDialog.getExistingDirectory(
1897            self,
1898            "Select Output Directory",
1899            default_dir,
1900        )
1901        if not directory:
1902            return
1903
1904        directory_path = Path(directory)
1905
1906        # Choose base name
1907        suggested_base = Path(self.file_path).stem or "image"
1908        base_name, ok = QtWidgets.QInputDialog.getText(
1909            self,
1910            "Base File Name",
1911            "Base name for saved images:",
1912            text=suggested_base,
1913        )
1914        if not ok:
1915            return
1916        base_name = base_name.strip()
1917        if not base_name:
1918            QtWidgets.QMessageBox.information(
1919                self,
1920                "Save Images",
1921                "Base name cannot be empty.",
1922            )
1923            return
1924
1925        # Choose format for main view
1926        format_labels = ["PNG (.png)", "TIFF (.tif)", "JPEG (.jpg)"]
1927        format_map = {
1928            0: ("PNG", ".png"),
1929            1: ("TIFF", ".tif"),
1930            2: ("JPEG", ".jpg"),
1931        }
1932
1933        fmt_label, ok = QtWidgets.QInputDialog.getItem(
1934            self,
1935            "Image Format",
1936            "Format for main view:",
1937            format_labels,
1938            0,
1939            False,
1940        )
1941        if not ok:
1942            return
1943
1944        try:
1945            fmt_index = format_labels.index(fmt_label)
1946        except ValueError:
1947            QtWidgets.QMessageBox.warning(
1948                self,
1949                "Save Images",
1950                "Unknown image format selected.",
1951            )
1952            return
1953
1954        fmt_name, ext = format_map.get(fmt_index, ("PNG", ".png"))
1955
1956        # Compose extra label for export using metadata (file, instrument,
1957        # acquisition mode, and AcquireDate from original metadata).
1958        overlay_label = self._build_export_overlay_label()
1959
1960        # Temporarily overlay metadata label above the scale bar during export
1961        extra_label_applied = False
1962        if self.scale_bar is not None and hasattr(self.scale_bar, "set_extra_label"):
1963            try:
1964                self.scale_bar.set_extra_label(overlay_label)
1965                extra_label_applied = True
1966            except Exception:
1967                extra_label_applied = False
1968
1969        # Capture main view (graphics widget) including annotations and label
1970        try:
1971            pixmap = self.glw.grab()
1972        except Exception as e:
1973            # Clean up overlay on failure
1974            if extra_label_applied:
1975                try:
1976                    self.scale_bar.set_extra_label(None)  # type: ignore[union-attr]
1977                except Exception:
1978                    pass
1979            QtWidgets.QMessageBox.critical(
1980                self,
1981                "Save Images",
1982                f"Failed to capture main view: {e}",
1983            )
1984            return
1985
1986        main_path = directory_path / f"{base_name}_view{ext}"
1987        if not pixmap.save(str(main_path), fmt_name):
1988            QtWidgets.QMessageBox.warning(
1989                self,
1990                "Save Images",
1991                f"Failed to save main view to {main_path}.",
1992            )
1993        else:
1994            logger.debug("Saved main view: %s (%s)", main_path, fmt_name)
1995
1996        # Remove temporary overlay label after saving
1997        if extra_label_applied:
1998            try:
1999                self.scale_bar.set_extra_label(None)  # type: ignore[union-attr]
2000            except Exception:
2001                pass
2002
2003        # Capture all open FFT windows as PNGs, with metadata + ROI label
2004        fft_saved = 0
2005        transform_windows = list(self._iter_transform_windows_recursive())
2006        for idx, fft_window in enumerate(transform_windows, start=1):
2007            # Build label: metadata summary and ROI number (from fft_name)
2008            parent_window = getattr(fft_window, "parent_image_window", None)
2009            base_label = None
2010            if parent_window is self:
2011                base_label = overlay_label
2012            elif parent_window is not None and hasattr(parent_window, "_build_export_overlay_label"):
2013                try:
2014                    base_label = parent_window._build_export_overlay_label()
2015                except Exception:
2016                    base_label = None
2017
2018            if not base_label:
2019                # Fallback to file name if we cannot get metadata
2020                try:
2021                    parent_file = getattr(parent_window, "file_path", None)
2022                    base_label = Path(parent_file).name if parent_file else "image"
2023                except Exception:
2024                    base_label = "image"
2025
2026            roi_label = getattr(fft_window, "fft_name", f"FFT {idx}")
2027            extra_label = f"{base_label} | {roi_label}"
2028
2029            extra_label_applied_fft = False
2030            scale_bar = getattr(fft_window, "scale_bar", None)
2031            if scale_bar is not None and hasattr(scale_bar, "set_extra_label"):
2032                try:
2033                    scale_bar.set_extra_label(extra_label)
2034                    extra_label_applied_fft = True
2035                except Exception:
2036                    extra_label_applied_fft = False
2037
2038            # Grab only the FFT view (graphics widget) so that
2039            # window chrome and buttons are not included, mirroring
2040            # how the main image view is exported.
2041            try:
2042                fft_view_widget = getattr(fft_window, "glw", fft_window)
2043                fft_pixmap = fft_view_widget.grab()
2044            except Exception:
2045                if extra_label_applied_fft:
2046                    try:
2047                        scale_bar.set_extra_label(None)  # type: ignore[union-attr]
2048                    except Exception:
2049                        pass
2050                continue
2051
2052            chain = self._transform_chain_label(fft_window)
2053            fft_path = directory_path / f"{base_name}_{chain}.png"
2054            if fft_pixmap.save(str(fft_path), "PNG"):
2055                fft_saved += 1
2056                logger.debug("Saved FFT view: %s", fft_path)
2057
2058            # Remove temporary overlay label after saving
2059            if extra_label_applied_fft:
2060                try:
2061                    scale_bar.set_extra_label(None)  # type: ignore[union-attr]
2062                except Exception:
2063                    pass
2064
2065        message_lines = [f"Saved main view to:\n{main_path}"]
2066        if fft_saved:
2067            message_lines.append(f"Saved {fft_saved} FFT view PNG file(s).")
2068        else:
2069            message_lines.append(
2070                "No FFT windows were open; only the main view was saved."
2071            )
2072
2073        QtWidgets.QMessageBox.information(
2074            self,
2075            "Save Images",
2076            "\n".join(message_lines),
2077        )
2078
2079    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
2080    # Metadata helpers for export overlays
2081    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
2082
2083    def _build_export_overlay_label(self) -> str:
2084        """Return a one-line label for export overlays.
2085
2086            Returns:
2087                Overlay label string containing file and transform context for export.
2088        """
2089
2090        # File name
2091        try:
2092            file_name = Path(self.file_path).name if self.file_path else "image"
2093        except Exception:
2094            file_name = "image"
2095
2096        microscope_tag = ""
2097        mode_tag = ""
2098        acq_date = ""
2099
2100        raw_meta = self._get_original_metadata_dict()
2101        if isinstance(raw_meta, dict):
2102            obj_info = (
2103                raw_meta.get("ObjectInfo")
2104                or raw_meta.get("objectInfo")
2105                or raw_meta.get("object_info")
2106            )
2107
2108            if isinstance(obj_info, dict):
2109                # AcquireDate: full string
2110                acq_val = (
2111                    obj_info.get("AcquireDate")
2112                    or obj_info.get("acquiredate")
2113                    or obj_info.get("Acquiredate")
2114                )
2115                if acq_val:
2116                    acq_date = str(acq_val)
2117
2118                # ExperimentalDescription contains Microscope + Mode
2119                exp_desc = (
2120                    obj_info.get("ExperimentalDescription")
2121                    or obj_info.get("experimentaldescription")
2122                    or obj_info.get("experimental_description")
2123                )
2124
2125                if isinstance(exp_desc, dict):
2126                    # Microscope: take second word
2127                    microscope_val = (
2128                        exp_desc.get("Microscope")
2129                        or exp_desc.get("microscope")
2130                    )
2131                    if isinstance(microscope_val, str):
2132                        words = microscope_val.split()
2133                        if len(words) >= 2:
2134                            microscope_tag = words[1]
2135
2136                    # Mode: take first word
2137                    mode_val = exp_desc.get("Mode") or exp_desc.get("mode")
2138                    if isinstance(mode_val, str):
2139                        parts = mode_val.strip().split()
2140                        if parts:
2141                            mode_tag = parts[0]
2142
2143        parts = [file_name]
2144        if microscope_tag:
2145            parts.append(microscope_tag)
2146        if mode_tag:
2147            parts.append(mode_tag)
2148        if acq_date:
2149            parts.append(acq_date)
2150
2151        return " | ".join(str(p) for p in parts if p)
2152
2153    def _show_metadata_window(self):
2154        """Open or refresh the metadata window for the current signal."""
2155        if self.signal is None:
2156            QtWidgets.QMessageBox.information(
2157                self, "Metadata", "No metadata available for this image."
2158            )
2159            return
2160
2161        raw_metadata = self._get_original_metadata_dict()
2162        cleaned_metadata = None
2163        if self.signal is not None and hasattr(self.signal, "metadata"):
2164            try:
2165                cleaned_metadata = self.signal.metadata.as_dictionary()
2166            except Exception:
2167                cleaned_metadata = None
2168
2169        file_name = Path(self.file_path).name
2170        title = f"Metadata - {file_name}"
2171
2172        if self.metadata_window is None:
2173            self.metadata_window = MetadataWindow(
2174                self,
2175                title=title,
2176                raw_metadata=raw_metadata,
2177                cleaned_metadata=cleaned_metadata,
2178            )
2179        else:
2180            self.metadata_window.setWindowTitle(title)
2181            self.metadata_window.update_metadata(
2182                raw_metadata=raw_metadata,
2183                cleaned_metadata=cleaned_metadata,
2184            )
2185
2186        self.metadata_window.show()
2187        self.metadata_window.raise_()
2188        self.metadata_window.activateWindow()

Window for viewing and analyzing a single image with FFT boxes.

ImageViewerWindow( file_path: str, signal=None, window_suffix: Optional[str] = None, view_mode: str = 'image', source_region: Optional[numpy.ndarray] = None, fft_region: Optional[numpy.ndarray] = None, fft_name: Optional[str] = None, parent_image_window: Optional[ImageViewerWindow] = None) 
 72    def __init__(
 73        self,
 74        file_path: str,
 75        signal=None,
 76        window_suffix: Optional[str] = None,
 77        view_mode: str = "image",
 78        source_region: Optional[np.ndarray] = None,
 79        fft_region: Optional[np.ndarray] = None,
 80        fft_name: Optional[str] = None,
 81        parent_image_window: Optional["ImageViewerWindow"] = None,
 82    ):
 83        """Initialize an image viewer window for displaying TEM images and measurements.
 84        
 85        Args:
 86            file_path: Path to the source image file.
 87            signal: HyperSpy Signal object to display. If None, loaded from file_path.
 88            window_suffix: Optional suffix to append to window title (e.g., for multi-image files).
 89            view_mode: Display mode - "image" for direct view or "fft" for Fourier transform.
 90            source_region: Optional array specifying source region for FFT windows.
 91            fft_region: Optional array specifying FFT region for inverse FFT windows.
 92            fft_name: Optional name/label for FFT windows.
 93            parent_image_window: Reference to parent viewer for FFT/inverse FFT relationships.
 94        """
 95        super().__init__()
 96        self.setAcceptDrops(True)
 97        self.file_path = file_path
 98        self.view_mode = view_mode
 99        self.signal = None
100        self.data = None
101        self.ax_x = None
102        self.ax_y = None
103        self.p1 = None
104        self.img_orig = None
105        self.glw = None
106        self.fft_boxes: List[pg.RectROI] = []
107        self.fft_count = 0
108        self.is_reciprocal_space = False
109        self.line_tool: Optional[LineDrawingTool] = None
110        self.fft_windows: List["ImageViewerWindow"] = []
111        self.fft_to_fft_window: Dict[pg.RectROI, "ImageViewerWindow"] = {}
112        self.fft_box_meta: Dict[pg.RectROI, Dict[str, object]] = {}
113        self.selected_fft_box: Optional[pg.RectROI] = None
114        self.inverse_fft_windows: List["ImageViewerWindow"] = []
115        self.inverse_fft_to_window: Dict[pg.RectROI, "ImageViewerWindow"] = {}
116        self.inverse_fft_box_meta: Dict[pg.RectROI, Dict[str, object]] = {}
117        self.inverse_fft_boxes: List[pg.RectROI] = []
118        self.inverse_fft_count = 0
119        self.selected_inverse_fft_box: Optional[pg.RectROI] = None
120        self.scale_bar: Optional[DynamicScaleBar] = None
121        self.measurement_history_window: Optional[MeasurementHistoryWindow] = None
122        self.metadata_window: Optional[MetadataWindow] = None
123        self.measurement_count = 0
124        self.profile_measurement_count = 0
125        self.btn_measure: Optional[QtWidgets.QPushButton] = None
126        self.measurement_items: List[Tuple[int, pg.PlotDataItem, pg.TextItem]] = []
127        self.profile_measurement_items: Dict[int, Dict[str, Any]] = {}
128        self.selected_measurement_index: Optional[int] = None
129
130        # Colormap state for the main image view
131        self._available_colormaps: List[str] = [
132            "gray",
133            "viridis",
134            "plasma",
135            "magma",
136            "inferno",
137            "cividis",
138        ]
139        self._current_colormap_index: int = 0
140        self.btn_colormap: Optional[QtWidgets.QAbstractButton] = None
141
142        # Vim-style command line (":" commands)
143        self.command_edit: Optional[QtWidgets.QLineEdit] = None
144
145        self.display_min: Optional[float] = None
146        self.display_max: Optional[float] = None
147        self.display_gamma: float = 1.0
148        self._tone_dialog: Optional[ToneCurveDialog] = None
149
150        self.fft_name = fft_name
151        self.parent_image_window = parent_image_window
152        self._magnitude_spectrum = None
153        self._fft_complex = None
154        self._inverse_fft_cache = None
155        self._inverse_fft_image = None
156        self._nyq_x = None
157        self._nyq_y = None
158        self._last_region_id = None
159        self._source_region = source_region if source_region is not None else fft_region
160        self._fft_region = self._source_region
161        self.freq_axis_base_unit: str = "m"
162        self._calibration_status: str = "metadata"
163        self._manual_calibrated: bool = False
164        self._line_draw_mode: str = "measurement"
165        self._calibration_dialog_state: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None
166        self._on_calibration_pixels_selected: Optional[Callable[[float], None]] = None
167        self._base_window_title: str = ""
168        self._render_settings: Dict[str, Any] = get_effective_render_settings()
169        self._mipmap_levels: List[np.ndarray] = []
170        self._current_mipmap_level: int = -1
171        self._display_image_full_res: Optional[np.ndarray] = None
172        self.measurements = MeasurementController(self, logger)
173        self.fft_manager = FFTWindowManager(self, logger, FFT_COLORS)
174        self.commands = ViewerCommandRouter(self, logger)
175        self._command_mode = CommandModeController(
176            command_edit_getter=lambda: self.command_edit,
177            run_command=self.commands.run_vim_command,
178            on_unknown_command=lambda cmd: QtWidgets.QMessageBox.information(
179                self,
180                "Command",
181                f"Unknown command: {cmd}",
182            ),
183            focus_target_getter=lambda: self.glw if hasattr(self.glw, "setFocus") else None,
184        )
185        self.help_actions = HelpDialogActions(
186            parent_widget=self,
187            menu_config_provider=lambda: build_menu_config_for_role(role="viewer", callbacks_map={}),
188            extra_shortcuts_provider=lambda: {
189                "Enter command mode": ":",
190                "Exit command mode": "Esc",
191                "Delete selected ROI": "Delete",
192            },
193            additional_colormaps_provider=lambda: self._available_colormaps,
194            logger_instance=logger,
195        )
196
197        if self.view_mode in {"fft", "inverse_fft"}:
198            self._setup_transform_view()
199        elif signal is not None:
200            self._setup_from_signal(signal, window_suffix)
201        else:
202            self._load_and_setup()
203
204        # Install a global key event filter so we can capture ':'
205        # even when the plot widget has focus.
206        app = QtWidgets.QApplication.instance()
207        if app is not None:
208            app.installEventFilter(self)

Initialize an image viewer window for displaying TEM images and measurements.

Args: file_path: Path to the source image file. signal: HyperSpy Signal object to display. If None, loaded from file_path. window_suffix: Optional suffix to append to window title (e.g., for multi-image files). view_mode: Display mode - "image" for direct view or "fft" for Fourier transform. source_region: Optional array specifying source region for FFT windows. fft_region: Optional array specifying FFT region for inverse FFT windows. fft_name: Optional name/label for FFT windows. parent_image_window: Reference to parent viewer for FFT/inverse FFT relationships.

file_path
view_mode
signal
data
ax_x
ax_y
p1
img_orig
glw
fft_boxes: List[pyqtgraph.graphicsItems.ROI.RectROI]
fft_count
is_reciprocal_space
line_tool: Optional[measurement_tools.LineDrawingTool]

fft_to_fft_window: Dict[pyqtgraph.graphicsItems.ROI.RectROI, ImageViewerWindow]
fft_box_meta: Dict[pyqtgraph.graphicsItems.ROI.RectROI, Dict[str, object]]
selected_fft_box: Optional[pyqtgraph.graphicsItems.ROI.RectROI]
inverse_fft_windows: List[ImageViewerWindow]
inverse_fft_to_window: Dict[pyqtgraph.graphicsItems.ROI.RectROI, ImageViewerWindow]
inverse_fft_box_meta: Dict[pyqtgraph.graphicsItems.ROI.RectROI, Dict[str, object]]
inverse_fft_boxes: List[pyqtgraph.graphicsItems.ROI.RectROI]
inverse_fft_count
selected_inverse_fft_box: Optional[pyqtgraph.graphicsItems.ROI.RectROI]

measurement_history_window: Optional[dialogs.MeasurementHistoryWindow]
metadata_window: Optional[dialogs.MetadataWindow]
measurement_count
profile_measurement_count
btn_measure: Optional[PyQt5.QtWidgets.QPushButton]
measurement_items: List[Tuple[int, pyqtgraph.graphicsItems.PlotDataItem.PlotDataItem, pyqtgraph.graphicsItems.TextItem.TextItem]]
profile_measurement_items: Dict[int, Dict[str, Any]]
selected_measurement_index: Optional[int]
btn_colormap: Optional[PyQt5.QtWidgets.QAbstractButton]
command_edit: Optional[PyQt5.QtWidgets.QLineEdit]
display_min: Optional[float]
display_max: Optional[float]
display_gamma: float
fft_name
parent_image_window
freq_axis_base_unit: str
measurements
fft_manager
commands
help_actions
def dragEnterEvent(self, event: PyQt5.QtGui.QDragEnterEvent): 
212    def dragEnterEvent(self, event: QtGui.QDragEnterEvent):  # type: ignore[override]
213        """Accept drag events for image files.
214
215                        Args:
216                            event: Qt event object carrying user interaction details.
217                    
218        """
219        if event.mimeData().hasUrls():
220            event.acceptProposedAction()

Accept drag events for image files.

Args: event: Qt event object carrying user interaction details.

def dropEvent(self, event: PyQt5.QtGui.QDropEvent): 
222    def dropEvent(self, event: QtGui.QDropEvent):  # type: ignore[override]
223        """Handle dropped local files and open valid image paths.
224
225                        Args:
226                            event: Qt event object carrying user interaction details.
227                    
228        """
229        from pathlib import Path as _Path
230
231        for url in event.mimeData().urls():
232            file_path = url.toLocalFile()
233            if not file_path:
234                continue
235            try:
236                if not _Path(file_path).is_file():
237                    continue
238            except Exception:
239                continue
240
241            open_image_file(file_path)

Handle dropped local files and open valid image paths.

Args: event: Qt event object carrying user interaction details.

image_bounds: Tuple[float, float, float, float] 
971    @property
972    def image_bounds(self) -> Tuple[float, float, float, float]:
973        """Get the pixel bounds of the displayed image.
974        
975        Returns:
976            (x_min, x_max, y_min, y_max) in image pixel coordinates.
977        """
978        x_offset = self.ax_x.offset if self.ax_x else 0
979        y_offset = self.ax_y.offset if self.ax_y else 0
980        w = self.ax_x.size * self.ax_x.scale if self.ax_x else 1
981        h = self.ax_y.size * self.ax_y.scale if self.ax_y else 1
982        return x_offset, y_offset, w, h

Get the pixel bounds of the displayed image.

Returns: (x_min, x_max, y_min, y_max) in image pixel coordinates.

def setup_ui(self): 
1014    def setup_ui(self):
1015        """Set up the main UI layout with plot, controls, and toolbars."""
1016        central = QtWidgets.QWidget()
1017        self.setCentralWidget(central)
1018        main_layout = QtWidgets.QVBoxLayout(central)
1019        main_layout.setContentsMargins(0, 0, 0, 0)
1020        self._setup_menu_bar()
1021
1022        self.glw = pg.GraphicsLayoutWidget()
1023        logger.debug(
1024            "setup_ui: mode=%s useOpenGL=%s QT_QPA_PLATFORM=%r QT_OPENGL=%r",
1025            self.view_mode,
1026            pg.getConfigOption("useOpenGL"),
1027            os.environ.get("QT_QPA_PLATFORM"),
1028            os.environ.get("QT_OPENGL"),
1029        )
1030        self.glw.ci.setContentsMargins(0, 0, 0, 0)
1031        if hasattr(self.glw.ci, "layout"):
1032            self.glw.ci.layout.setContentsMargins(0, 0, 0, 0)
1033            self.glw.ci.layout.setSpacing(0)
1034        main_layout.addWidget(self.glw)
1035
1036        # Hidden command line at the bottom, shown when ':' is pressed
1037        self.command_edit = QtWidgets.QLineEdit()
1038        self.command_edit.setPlaceholderText(
1039            "Vim command (:F, :d, :e <file>, :E, :a)"
1040        )
1041        self.command_edit.returnPressed.connect(self._execute_command_from_line)
1042        self.command_edit.hide()
1043        main_layout.addWidget(self.command_edit)
1044
1045        # Shortcut for ':' so command mode is easy to enter while this
1046        # image window is active.
1047        colon_shortcut = QtGui.QShortcut(QtGui.QKeySequence(":"), self)
1048        colon_shortcut.activated.connect(self._enter_command_mode)
1049
1050        self.btn_measure = QtWidgets.QPushButton("Measure Distance")
1051        self.btn_measure.setCheckable(True)
1052        self.btn_measure.clicked.connect(self.measurements.toggle_line_measurement)
1053        self.btn_measure.hide()
1054
1055        self.p1 = self.glw.addPlot()
1056        self.p1.hideAxis("bottom")
1057        self.p1.hideAxis("left")
1058        self.p1.showAxis("top", False)
1059        self.p1.showAxis("right", False)
1060        self.p1.hideButtons()
1061        self.p1.setMenuEnabled(False)
1062
1063        self.p1.vb.setAspectLocked(True, ratio=1.0)
1064        if hasattr(self.p1.vb, "setBorder"):
1065            self.p1.vb.setBorder(None)
1066
1067        self.img_orig = pg.ImageItem(axisOrder="row-major")
1068        self.p1.addItem(self.img_orig)
1069        self._apply_render_preferences_to_view()
1070        self.p1.invertY(True)
1071        if self.view_mode == "fft":
1072            cmap = pg.colormap.get("magma")
1073            self.img_orig.setLookupTable(cmap.getLookupTable())
1074            self._update_image_display()
1075            if self._nyq_x is not None and self._nyq_y is not None:
1076                self.img_orig.setRect(
1077                    QtCore.QRectF(-self._nyq_x, -self._nyq_y, 2 * self._nyq_x, 2 * self._nyq_y)
1078                )
1079            if hasattr(self.p1.vb, "setPadding"):
1080                self.p1.vb.setPadding(0.0)
1081            fft_unit, fft_reciprocal = unit_utils.scale_bar_unit_and_mode(
1082                self.freq_axis_base_unit,
1083                reciprocal_hint=True,
1084            )
1085            self.scale_bar = DynamicScaleBar(self.p1.vb, units=fft_unit)
1086            self.scale_bar.reciprocal = fft_reciprocal
1087        elif self.view_mode == "inverse_fft":
1088            self.img_orig.setLookupTable(None)
1089            self._update_image_display()
1090            x_offset, y_offset, w, h = self.image_bounds
1091            self.img_orig.setRect(QtCore.QRectF(x_offset, y_offset, w, h))
1092
1093            if hasattr(self.p1.vb, "setPadding"):
1094                self.p1.vb.setPadding(0.0)
1095            self.p1.setXRange(x_offset, x_offset + w, padding=0)
1096            self.p1.setYRange(y_offset, y_offset + h, padding=0)
1097
1098            axis_units = self.ax_x.units if self.ax_x is not None else "nm"
1099            display_unit, reciprocal_mode = unit_utils.scale_bar_unit_and_mode(
1100                axis_units,
1101                reciprocal_hint=False,
1102            )
1103            self.scale_bar = DynamicScaleBar(self.p1.vb, units=display_unit)
1104            self.scale_bar.reciprocal = reciprocal_mode
1105        else:
1106            self._apply_colormap()
1107            self._update_image_display()
1108
1109            x_offset, y_offset, w, h = self.image_bounds
1110            self.img_orig.setRect(QtCore.QRectF(x_offset, y_offset, w, h))
1111
1112            if hasattr(self.p1.vb, "setPadding"):
1113                self.p1.vb.setPadding(0.0)
1114            self.p1.setXRange(x_offset, x_offset + w, padding=0)
1115            self.p1.setYRange(y_offset, y_offset + h, padding=0)
1116
1117            axis_units = self.ax_x.units if self.ax_x is not None else "nm"
1118            display_unit, reciprocal_mode = unit_utils.scale_bar_unit_and_mode(
1119                axis_units,
1120                reciprocal_hint=self.is_reciprocal_space,
1121            )
1122            self.scale_bar = DynamicScaleBar(self.p1.vb, units=display_unit)
1123            self.scale_bar.reciprocal = reciprocal_mode
1124            if not reciprocal_mode:
1125                try:
1126                    overlay_label = self._build_export_overlay_label()
1127                    if overlay_label and hasattr(self.scale_bar, "set_extra_label"):
1128                        self.scale_bar.set_extra_label(overlay_label)
1129                except Exception:
1130                    pass
1131
1132            self._refresh_scale_bar_calibration_tag()
1133
1134        self.line_tool = LineDrawingTool(
1135            self.p1,
1136            self.measurements.on_line_drawn,
1137            self._on_measurement_drawing_state_changed,
1138        )
1139
1140        if hasattr(self.p1, "vb") and hasattr(self.p1.vb, "sigRangeChanged"):
1141            self.p1.vb.sigRangeChanged.connect(self._on_view_range_changed)
1142
1143        self.setup_keyboard_shortcuts()

Set up the main UI layout with plot, controls, and toolbars.

def setup_keyboard_shortcuts(self): 
1384    def setup_keyboard_shortcuts(self):
1385        """Configure keyboard shortcuts for common image operations.
1386        
1387        Sets up Delete key for removing FFT regions and other navigation shortcuts.
1388        """
1389        delete_shortcut = QtGui.QShortcut(QtGui.QKeySequence.Delete, self)
1390        delete_shortcut.activated.connect(self.fft_manager.delete_selected_roi)
1391
1392        backspace_shortcut = QtGui.QShortcut(
1393            QtGui.QKeySequence(QtCore.Qt.Key_Backspace), self
1394        )
1395        backspace_shortcut.activated.connect(self.fft_manager.delete_selected_roi)
1396
1397        escape_shortcut = QtGui.QShortcut(QtGui.QKeySequence(QtCore.Qt.Key_Escape), self)
1398        escape_shortcut.activated.connect(self.measurements.exit_measure_mode)

Configure keyboard shortcuts for common image operations.

Sets up Delete key for removing FFT regions and other navigation shortcuts.

def eventFilter(self, obj, event): 
1533    def eventFilter(self, obj, event):  # type: ignore[override]
1534        """Capture ':' globally when this window is active.
1535
1536            Args:
1537                obj: QObject currently being filtered by the event filter.
1538                event: Qt drag/drop or input event provided by the GUI framework.
1539        """
1540        if self._command_mode.handle_key_event(self.isActiveWindow(), event):
1541            return True
1542
1543        return super().eventFilter(obj, event)

Capture ':' globally when this window is active.

Args: obj: QObject currently being filtered by the event filter. event: Qt drag/drop or input event provided by the GUI framework.
